authors_text: Giorgio Visani,Giacomo Graffi,Mattia Alfero,Enrico Bagli,Davide Capuzzo,Federico Chesani
title: Enabling Synthetic Data adoption in regulated domains
title_zh: 支持在受监管领域采用合成数据
abstract: The switch from a Model-Centric to a Data-Centric mindset is putting emphasis on data and its quality rather than algorithms, bringing forward new challenges. In particular, the sensitive nature of the information in highly regulated scenarios needs to be accounted for. Specific approaches to address the privacy issue have been developed, as Privacy Enhancing Technologies. However, they frequently cause loss of information, putting forward a crucial trade-off among data quality and privacy. A clever way to bypass such a conundrum relies on Synthetic Data: data obtained from a generative process, learning the real data properties. Both Academia and Industry realized the importance of evaluating synthetic data quality: without all-round reliable metrics, the innovative data generation task has no proper objective function to maximize. Despite that, the topic remains under-explored. For this reason, we systematically catalog the important traits of synthetic data quality and privacy, and devise a specific methodology to test them. The result is DAISYnt (aDoption of Artificial Intelligence SYnthesis): a comprehensive suite of advanced tests, which sets a de facto standard for synthetic data evaluation. As a practical use-case, a variety of generative algorithms have been trained on real-world Credit Bureau Data. The best model has been assessed, using DAISYnt on the different synthetic replicas. Further potential uses, among others, entail auditing and fine-tuning of generative models or ensuring high quality of a given synthetic dataset. From a prescriptive viewpoint, eventually, DAISYnt may pave the way to synthetic data adoption in highly regulated domains, ranging from Finance to Healthcare, through Insurance and Education.

In particular, the sensitive nature of the information in highly regulated scenarios needs to be accounted for. Specific approaches to address the privacy issue have been developed, as Privacy Enhancing Technologies. The result is DAISYnt (aDoption of Artificial Intelligence SYnthesis): a comprehensive suite of advanced tests, which sets a de facto standard for synthetic data evaluation. From a prescriptive viewpoint, eventually, DAISYnt may pave the way to synthetic data adoption in highly regulated domains, ranging from Finance to Healthcare, through Insurance and Education.
abstract_zh: 从以模型为中心到以数据为中心的思维方式的转变将重点放在数据及其质量而不是算法上，从而带来了新的挑战。特别是，需要考虑高度监管场景中信息的敏感性。解决隐私问题的具体方法已经被开发出来，例如隐私增强技术。然而，它们经常导致信息丢失，从而在数据质量和隐私之间提出了至关重要的权衡。绕过这一难题的一个聪明方法是依赖于合成数据：从生成过程中获得的数据，学习真实的数据属性。学术界和工业界都意识到评估合成数据质量的重要性：如果没有全面可靠的指标，创新数据生成任务就没有适当的目标函数来最大化。尽管如此，这个话题仍然没有得到充分探索。因此，我们系统地对合成数据质量和隐私的重要特征进行了分类，并设计了一种具体的方法来测试它们。结果是 DAISYnt（人工智能合成的采用）：一套全面的高级测试，为合成数据评估设定了事实上的标准。作为一个实际用例，各种生成算法已经在现实世界的信用局数据上进行了训练。已在不同的合成副本上使用 DAISYnt 评估了最佳模型。进一步的潜在用途包括对生成模型进行审核和微调或确保给定合成数据集的高质量。从规定的角度来看，DAISYnt 最终可能为高度监管领域（从金融到医疗保健，到保险和教育）采用合成数据铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DAISYnt的综合评估框架，用于在受监管领域中系统评估合成数据的质量和隐私性，以促进合成数据的应用。
AI.motivation: 在高度监管的领域中，隐私保护与数据质量之间的权衡问题限制了合成数据的采用，现有隐私增强技术常导致信息丢失，且缺乏全面的评估指标。
AI.method: 通过系统化梳理合成数据质量与隐私的关键特征，设计DAISYnt评估框架，结合多种生成算法在真实信用局数据上的实验验证。
AI.result: 开发出DAISYnt工具套件，并在实际信用数据中验证其有效性，识别出最佳生成模型，为审计、调优及数据质量保障提供支持。
AI.conclusion: DAISYnt为金融、医疗等受监管领域提供了合成数据评估的基准，有助于推动其在敏感场景中的安全应用。

title: Reuse your features: unifying retrieval and feature-metric alignment
title_zh: 重用您的特征：统一检索和特征度量对齐
abstract: We propose a compact pipeline to unify all the steps of Visual Localization: image retrieval, candidate re-ranking and initial pose estimation, and camera pose refinement. Our key assumption is that the deep features used for these individual tasks share common characteristics, so we should reuse them in all the procedures of the pipeline. Our DRAN (Deep Retrieval and image Alignment Network) is able to extract global descriptors for efficient image retrieval, use intermediate hierarchical features to re-rank the retrieval list and produce an initial pose guess, which is finally refined by means of a feature-metric optimization based on learned deep multi-scale dense features. DRAN is the first single network able to produce the features for the three steps of visual localization. DRAN achieves competitive performance in terms of robustness and accuracy under challenging conditions in public benchmarks, outperforming other unified approaches and consuming lower computational and memory cost than its counterparts using multiple networks. Code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/jmorlana/DRAN.
summary: We propose a compact pipeline to unify all the steps of Visual Localization: image retrieval, candidate re-ranking and initial pose estimation, and camera pose refinement. Our key assumption is that the deep features used for these individual tasks share common characteristics, so we should reuse them in all the procedures of the pipeline. Our DRAN (Deep Retrieval and image Alignment Network) is able to extract global descriptors for efficient image retrieval, use intermediate hierarchical features to re-rank the retrieval list and produce an initial pose guess, which is finally refined by means of a feature-metric optimization based on learned deep multi-scale dense features. DRAN is the first single network able to produce the features for the three steps of visual localization. DRAN achieves competitive performance in terms of robustness and accuracy under challenging conditions in public benchmarks, outperforming other unified approaches and consuming lower computational and memory cost than its counterparts using multiple networks. Code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/jmorlana/DRAN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个紧凑的流程来统一视觉定位的所有步骤：图像检索、候选重新排序和初始姿态估计以及相机姿态细化。我们的关键假设是，用于这些单独任务的深层特征具有共同的特征，因此我们应该在管道的所有过程中重用它们。我们的 DRAN（深度检索和图像对齐网络）能够提取全局描述符以实现高效图像检索，使用中间层次特征对检索列表进行重新排序并生成初始姿态猜测，最终通过基于学习的深度多尺度密集特征的特征度量优化来完善该初始姿态猜测。 DRAN 是第一个能够产生视觉定位三步特征的单一网络。 DRAN 在公共基准测试中具有挑战性的条件下，在鲁棒性和准确性方面实现了具有竞争力的性能，优于其他统一方法，并且比使用多个网络的同类方法消耗更低的计算和内存成本。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/jmorlana/DRAN 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DRAN的紧凑型网络，统一了视觉定位中的图像检索、候选重排序、初始位姿估计和相机位姿优化步骤。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通常使用多个独立网络处理视觉定位的不同步骤，导致计算和内存成本高昂。作者认为不同任务的深度特征具有共性，应通过特征复用提升效率。
AI.method: DRAN通过全局描述子实现高效图像检索，利用中间层次特征进行重排序和初始位姿预测，并基于多尺度密集特征的特征度量优化最终优化位姿。
AI.result: 在公开基准测试中，DRAN在鲁棒性和精度上表现优异，优于其他统一方法，且计算和内存消耗低于多网络方案。
AI.conclusion: DRAN首次通过单一网络完成视觉定位全流程，验证了特征复用的有效性，为高效视觉定位提供了新思路。

authors_text: Andrea Mauri,Andrea Tocchetti,Lorenzo Corti,Yen-Chia Hsu,Himanshu Verma,Marco Brambilla
title: COCTEAU: an Empathy-Based Tool for Decision-Making
title_zh: COCTEAU：基于同理心的决策工具
comment: accepted at Posters and Demos Track at The Web Conference 2022 (WWW 2022)
comments: accepted at Posters and Demos Track at The Web Conference 2022 (WWW 2022)
abstract: Traditional approaches to data-informed policymaking are often tailored to specific contexts and lack strong citizen involvement and collaboration, which are required to design sustainable policies. We argue the importance of empathy-based methods in the policymaking domain given the successes in diverse settings, such as healthcare and education. In this paper, we introduce COCTEAU (Co-Creating The European Union), a novel framework built on the combination of empathy and gamification to create a tool aimed at strengthening interactions between citizens and policy-makers. We describe our design process and our concrete implementation, which has already undergone preliminary assessments with different stakeholders. Moreover, we briefly report pilot results from the assessment. Finally, we describe the structure and goals of our demonstration regarding the newfound formats and organizational aspects of academic conferences.
summary: Traditional approaches to data-informed policymaking are often tailored to specific contexts and lack strong citizen involvement and collaboration, which are required to design sustainable policies. We argue the importance of empathy-based methods in the policymaking domain given the successes in diverse settings, such as healthcare and education. In this paper, we introduce COCTEAU (Co-Creating The European Union), a novel framework built on the combination of empathy and gamification to create a tool aimed at strengthening interactions between citizens and policy-makers. We describe our design process and our concrete implementation, which has already undergone preliminary assessments with different stakeholders. Moreover, we briefly report pilot results from the assessment. Finally, we describe the structure and goals of our demonstration regarding the newfound formats and organizational aspects of academic conferences.
abstract_zh: 传统的基于数据的决策方法通常是针对特定情况量身定制的，缺乏强有力的公民参与和协作，而这是设计可持续政策所必需的。鉴于医疗保健和教育等不同环境中的成功，我们认为基于同理心的方法在政策制定领域的重要性。在本文中，我们介绍了 COCTEAU（共同创建欧盟），这是一个基于同理心和游戏化相结合的新颖框架，旨在创建旨在加强公民与政策制定者之间互动的工具。我们描述了我们的设计过程和具体实施，这些过程已经过不同利益相关者的初步评估。此外，我们简要报告了评估的试点结果。最后，我们描述了关于学术会议的新形式和组织方面的演示的结构和目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COCTEAU框架，结合同理心与游戏化设计，旨在增强公民与政策制定者之间的互动，推动可持续政策制定。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动的政策制定缺乏公民参与，而同理心方法在医疗和教育等领域已取得成功，需开发新型协作工具。
AI.method: 通过设计结合同理心与游戏化的框架，描述具体实现过程，并进行多利益相关方的初步评估与试点测试。
AI.result: 初步评估显示工具有效性，试点结果及学术会议新形式的结构与目标被阐述。
AI.conclusion: COCTEAU框架为政策制定提供了新型协作模式，同时推动了学术会议形式的创新。

search_text: COCTEAU: an Empathy-Based Tool for Decision-Making COCTEAU：基于同理心的决策工具 Traditional approaches to data-informed policymaking are often tailored to specific contexts and lack strong citizen involvement and collaboration, which are required to design sustainable policies. We argue the importance of empathy-based methods in the policymaking domain given the successes in diverse settings, such as healthcare and education. In this paper, we introduce COCTEAU (Co-Creating The European Union), a novel framework built on the combination of empathy and gamification to create a tool aimed at strengthening interactions between citizens and policy-makers. We describe our design process and our concrete implementation, which has already undergone preliminary assessments with different stakeholders. Moreover, we briefly report pilot results from the assessment. Finally, we describe the structure and goals of our demonstration regarding the newfound formats and organizational aspects of academic conferences. 传统的基于数据的决策方法通常是针对特定情况量身定制的，缺乏强有力的公民参与和协作，而这是设计可持续政策所必需的。鉴于医疗保健和教育等不同环境中的成功，我们认为基于同理心的方法在政策制定领域的重要性。在本文中，我们介绍了 COCTEAU（共同创建欧盟），这是一个基于同理心和游戏化相结合的新颖框架，旨在创建旨在加强公民与政策制定者之间互动的工具。我们描述了我们的设计过程和具体实施，这些过程已经过不同利益相关者的初步评估。此外，我们简要报告了评估的试点结果。最后，我们描述了关于学术会议的新形式和组织方面的演示的结构和目标。 本文提出COCTEAU框架，结合同理心与游戏化设计，旨在增强公民与政策制定者之间的互动，推动可持续政策制定。 Andrea Mauri,Andrea Tocchetti,Lorenzo Corti,Yen-Chia Hsu,Himanshu Verma,Marco Brambilla cs.HC

authors_text: Robert Lupoiu,Samuel S. H. Ng,Jonathan A. Fan,Konrad Walus
title: Automated Atomic Silicon Quantum Dot Circuit Design via Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习进行自动化原子硅量子点电路设计
abstract: Robust automated design tools are crucial for the proliferation of any computing technology. We introduce the first automated design tool for the silicon dangling bond quantum dot computing technology, which is an extremely versatile and flexible single-atom computing circuitry framework. The automated designer is capable of navigating the complex, hyperdimensional design spaces of arbitrarily sized design areas and truth tables by employing a tabula rasa double-deep Q-learning reinforcement learning algorithm. Robust policy convergence is demonstrated for a wide range of two-input, one-output logic circuits and a two-input, two-output half-adder, designed with an order of magnitude fewer SiDBs in several orders of magnitude less time than the only other half-adder demonstrated in the literature. We anticipate that reinforcement learning-based automated design tools will accelerate the development of the SiDB quantum dot computing technology, leading to its eventual adoption in specialized computing hardware.
summary: Robust automated design tools are crucial for the proliferation of any computing technology. We introduce the first automated design tool for the silicon dangling bond quantum dot computing technology, which is an extremely versatile and flexible single-atom computing circuitry framework. The automated designer is capable of navigating the complex, hyperdimensional design spaces of arbitrarily sized design areas and truth tables by employing a tabula rasa double-deep Q-learning reinforcement learning algorithm. Robust policy convergence is demonstrated for a wide range of two-input, one-output logic circuits and a two-input, two-output half-adder, designed with an order of magnitude fewer SiDBs in several orders of magnitude less time than the only other half-adder demonstrated in the literature. We anticipate that reinforcement learning-based automated design tools will accelerate the development of the SiDB quantum dot computing technology, leading to its eventual adoption in specialized computing hardware.
abstract_zh: 强大的自动化设计工具对于任何计算技术的扩散都至关重要。我们推出了第一个用于硅悬键量子点计算技术的自动化设计工具，这是一种极其通用且灵活的单原子计算电路框架。通过采用白板双深度 Q 学习强化学习算法，自动化设计器能够在任意大小的设计区域和真值表的复杂超维设计空间中导航。鲁棒的策略收敛性被证明适用于各种两输入、一输出逻辑电路和一个两输入、两输出半加器，与文献中演示的唯一其他半加器相比，其设计的 SiDB 数量减少了一个数量级，时间也缩短了几个数量级。我们预计基于强化学习的自动化设计工具将加速 SiDB 量子点计算技术的发展，最终在专用计算硬件中得到采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的自动设计工具，用于硅悬键量子点计算技术的电路设计。
AI.motivation: 为了推动计算技术的发展，需要强大的自动化设计工具，而目前缺乏针对硅悬键量子点计算技术的自动化设计工具。
AI.method: 使用了一种双深度Q学习强化学习算法，通过从零开始的学习方式，探索复杂的高维设计空间。
AI.result: 该工具能够在更短时间内使用更少的硅悬键量子点设计出多种逻辑电路，包括半加法器。
AI.conclusion: 基于强化学习的自动化设计工具将加速硅悬键量子点计算技术的发展，并最终推动其在专用计算硬件中的应用。

title: Curriculum: A Broad-Coverage Benchmark for Linguistic Phenomena in Natural Language Understanding
title_zh: 课程：自然语言理解中语言现象的广泛覆盖基准
abstract: In the age of large transformer language models, linguistic evaluation play an important role in diagnosing models' abilities and limitations on natural language understanding. However, current evaluation methods show some significant shortcomings. In particular, they do not provide insight into how well a language model captures distinct linguistic skills essential for language understanding and reasoning. Thus they fail to effectively map out the aspects of language understanding that remain challenging to existing models, which makes it hard to discover potential limitations in models and datasets. In this paper, we introduce Curriculum as a new format of NLI benchmark for evaluation of broad-coverage linguistic phenomena. Curriculum contains a collection of datasets that covers 36 types of major linguistic phenomena and an evaluation procedure for diagnosing how well a language model captures reasoning skills for distinct types of linguistic phenomena. We show that this linguistic-phenomena-driven benchmark can serve as an effective tool for diagnosing model behavior and verifying model learning quality. In addition, our experiments provide insight into the limitation of existing benchmark datasets and state-of-the-art models that may encourage future research on re-designing datasets, model architectures, and learning objectives.
summary: In the age of large transformer language models, linguistic evaluation play an important role in diagnosing models' abilities and limitations on natural language understanding. However, current evaluation methods show some significant shortcomings. In particular, they do not provide insight into how well a language model captures distinct linguistic skills essential for language understanding and reasoning. Thus they fail to effectively map out the aspects of language understanding that remain challenging to existing models, which makes it hard to discover potential limitations in models and datasets. In this paper, we introduce Curriculum as a new format of NLI benchmark for evaluation of broad-coverage linguistic phenomena. Curriculum contains a collection of datasets that covers 36 types of major linguistic phenomena and an evaluation procedure for diagnosing how well a language model captures reasoning skills for distinct types of linguistic phenomena. We show that this linguistic-phenomena-driven benchmark can serve as an effective tool for diagnosing model behavior and verifying model learning quality. In addition, our experiments provide insight into the limitation of existing benchmark datasets and state-of-the-art models that may encourage future research on re-designing datasets, model architectures, and learning objectives.
abstract_zh: 在大型变压器语言模型时代，语言评估在诊断模型的自然语言理解能力和局限性方面发挥着重要作用。然而，当前的评估方法存在一些重大缺陷。特别是，它们没有提供关于语言模型如何很好地捕捉语言理解和推理所必需的独特语言技能的见解。因此，他们无法有效地找出对现有模型仍然具有挑战性的语言理解方面，这使得很难发现模型和数据集中的潜在局限性。在本文中，我们引入课程作为 NLI 基准的新格式，用于评估广泛覆盖的语言现象。课程包含涵盖 36 种主要语言现象的数据集，以及用于诊断语言模型捕获不同类型语言现象的推理技能的评估程序。我们证明，这种语言现象驱动的基准可以作为诊断模型行为和验证模型学习质量的有效工具。此外，我们的实验深入了解了现有基准数据集和最先进模型的局限性，这可能会鼓励未来对重新设计数据集、模型架构和学习目标的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Curriculum，一个涵盖36种语言现象的自然语言理解评估基准，用于诊断语言模型的语言理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法无法有效揭示语言模型在不同语言现象上的能力差异及数据集和模型的局限性。
AI.method: 构建包含36类语言现象的数据集集合，并设计评估流程以诊断模型对各类语言现象的推理能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该基准能有效评估模型表现，揭示现有数据集和前沿模型的不足。
AI.conclusion: Curriculum为改进数据集设计、模型架构和学习目标提供了新方向。

title: Edge Labelled Graphs and Property Graphs; a comparison from the user perspective
title_zh: 边标记图和属性图；从用户角度进行比较
abstract: This study compares participant acceptance of the property graph and edge-labelled graph paradigms, as represented by Cypher and the proposed extensions to the W3C standards, RDF* and SPARQL*. In general, modelling preferences are consistent across the two paradigms. When presented with location information, participants preferred to create nodes to represent cities, rather than use metadata; although the preference was less marked for Cypher. In Cypher, participants showed little difference in preference between representing dates or population size as nodes. In RDF*, this choice was not necessary since both could be represented as literals. However, there was a significant preference for using the date as metadata to describe a triple containing population size, rather than vice versa. There was no significant difference overall in accuracy of interpretation of queries in the two paradigms; although in one specific case, the use of a reverse arrow in Cypher was interpreted significantly more accurately than the ^ symbol in SPARQL. Based on our results and on the comments of participants, we make some recommendations for modellers. Techniques for reifing RDF have attracted a great deal of research. Recently, a hybrid approach, employing some of the features of property graphs, has claimed to offer an improved technique for RDF reification. Query-time reasoning is also a requirement which has prompted a number of proposed extensions to SPARQL and which is only possible to a limited extent in the property graph paradigm. Another recent development, the hypergraph paradigm enables more powerful query-time reasoning. There is a need for more research into the user acceptance of these various more powerful approaches to modelling and querying. Such research should take account of complex modelling situations.

abstract_zh: 本研究比较了参与者对属性图和边缘标记图范式的接受程度，以 Cypher 为代表，以及 W3C 标准、RDF* 和 SPARQL* 的拟议扩展。一般来说，两种范式的建模偏好是一致的。当提供位置信息时，参与者更愿意创建节点来代表城市，而不是使用元数据；尽管对 Cypher 的偏好不太明显。在 Cypher 中，参与者在将日期或人口规模表示为节点方面的偏好几乎没有差异。在 RDF* 中，这种选择不是必需的，因为两者都可以表示为文字。然而，人们更倾向于使用日期作为元数据来描述包含人口规模的三元组，而不是反之亦然。两种范式中查询解释的准确性总体上没有显着差异；尽管在一种特定情况下，Cypher 中反向箭头的使用比 SPARQL 中的 ^ 符号的解释要准确得多。根据我们的结果和参与者的评论，我们为建模者提出了一些建议。改进 RDF 的技术吸引了大量的研究。最近，一种采用属性图的一些特征的混合方法声称可以提供一种改进的 RDF 具体化技术。查询时推理也是一项要求，它促使提出了许多对 SPARQL 的扩展，并且在属性图范式中只能在有限的范围内实现。最近的另一个发展是，超图范式支持更强大的查询时推理。需要对用户对这些各种更强大的建模和查询方法的接受程度进行更多研究。此类研究应考虑复杂的建模情况。

AI.tldr: 本文从用户视角比较了属性图与边标记图两种范式的接受度，分析了建模偏好和查询准确性差异。
AI.motivation: 研究用户对不同图数据模型的接受度，为建模选择提供依据，并探讨RDF重新化等技术的改进方向。
AI.method: 通过实验对比Cypher（属性图）与RDF*/SPARQL*（边标记图）的用户使用偏好，分析建模决策和查询理解准确性。
AI.result: 用户更倾向用节点表示城市等实体，Cypher中日期和人口数据的节点化偏好不显著，而RDF*中日期作为元数据更受青睐；查询准确性总体无显著差异，但Cypher的反向箭头符号理解更准确。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究用户对更复杂建模和查询方法（如超图范式）的接受度，以优化技术设计。

authors_text: Michael Godehardt,Ali Moghiseh,Christine Oetjen,Joachim Ohser,Simon Ringger,Katja Schladitz,Ingo Windschiegel
title: Assessing cloudiness in nonwovens
title_zh: 评估非织造布的浑浊度
comment: FILTECH 2022 - Filter Media Quality Control / Pore Size Analysis
comments: FILTECH 2022 - Filter Media Quality Control / Pore Size Analysis
abstract: The homogeneity of filter media is important for material selection and quality control, along with the specific weight (nominal grammage) and the distribution of the local weight. Cloudiness or formation is a concept used to describe deviations from homogeneity in filter media. We suggest to derive the cloudiness index from the power spectrum of the relative local areal weight, integrated over a selected frequency range. The power spectrum captures the energy density in a broad spectral range. Moreover, under certain conditions, the structure of a nonwoven is fully characterized by the areal weight, the variance of the local areal weight, and the power spectrum. Consequently, the power spectrum is the parameter that exclusively reflects the cloudiness. Here, we address questions arising from practical application. The most prominent is the choice of the spectral band. It certainly depends on the characteristic "size of the clouds", but is limited by the size and lateral resolution of the images. We show that the cloudiness index based on the power spectrum of the relative local areal weight is theoretically well founded and can be robustly measured from image data. Choosing the spectral band allows to capture the cloudiness either visually perceived or found to be decisive for product properties. It is thus well suited to build a technical standard on it.
summary: The homogeneity of filter media is important for material selection and quality control, along with the specific weight (nominal grammage) and the distribution of the local weight. Cloudiness or formation is a concept used to describe deviations from homogeneity in filter media. We suggest to derive the cloudiness index from the power spectrum of the relative local areal weight, integrated over a selected frequency range. The power spectrum captures the energy density in a broad spectral range. Moreover, under certain conditions, the structure of a nonwoven is fully characterized by the areal weight, the variance of the local areal weight, and the power spectrum. Consequently, the power spectrum is the parameter that exclusively reflects the cloudiness. Here, we address questions arising from practical application. The most prominent is the choice of the spectral band. It certainly depends on the characteristic "size of the clouds", but is limited by the size and lateral resolution of the images. We show that the cloudiness index based on the power spectrum of the relative local areal weight is theoretically well founded and can be robustly measured from image data. Choosing the spectral band allows to capture the cloudiness either visually perceived or found to be decisive for product properties. It is thus well suited to build a technical standard on it.
abstract_zh: 过滤介质的均匀性对于材料选择和质量控制非常重要，此外还有比重（标称克重）和局部重量的分布。浑浊或形成是用于描述过滤介质均匀性偏差的概念。我们建议从相对局部区域权重的功率谱得出云度指数，并在选定的频率范围内积分。功率谱捕获宽光谱范围内的能量密度。此外，在一定条件下，非织造布的结构完全由面积重量、局部面积重量的方差和功率谱来表征。因此，功率谱是唯一反映云度的参数。在这里，我们解决实际应用中出现的问题。最突出的是光谱带的选择。它当然取决于“云的大小”特征，但受到图像的大小和横向分辨率的限制。我们表明，基于相对局部区域权重的功率谱的云度指数在理论上是有根据的，并且可以从图像数据中稳健地测量。选择光谱带可以捕获视觉上感知的或发现对产品特性起决定性作用的浑浊度。因此非常适合在此基础上建立技术标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过分析非织造材料的局部面积重量功率谱来评估其云雾度（均匀性偏差）的方法。
AI.motivation: 非织造滤材的均匀性对材料选择和质量控制至关重要，传统方法难以量化云雾度，需建立客观评估标准。
AI.method: 基于局部面积重量的相对值功率谱，选取特定频率范围积分计算云雾度指数，结合方差与功率谱特征表征材料结构。
AI.result: 理论验证表明该方法可稳健地从图像数据中测量云雾度，频率范围选择可适配视觉感知或产品性能关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非织造材料云雾度评估提供了理论依据和测量基础，具备制定技术标准的可行性。

authors_text: Huming Qiu,Hua Ma,Zhi Zhang,Alsharif Abuadbba,Wei Kang,Anmin Fu,Yansong Gao
title: Towards A Critical Evaluation of Robustness for Deep Learning Backdoor Countermeasures
title_zh: 对深度学习后门对策的稳健性进行批判性评估
abstract: Since Deep Learning (DL) backdoor attacks have been revealed as one of the most insidious adversarial attacks, a number of countermeasures have been developed with certain assumptions defined in their respective threat models. However, the robustness of these countermeasures is inadvertently ignored, which can introduce severe consequences, e.g., a countermeasure can be misused and result in a false implication of backdoor detection. For the first time, we critically examine the robustness of existing backdoor countermeasures with an initial focus on three influential model-inspection ones that are Neural Cleanse (S&P'19), ABS (CCS'19), and MNTD (S&P'21). Although the three countermeasures claim that they work well under their respective threat models, they have inherent unexplored non-robust cases depending on factors such as given tasks, model architectures, datasets, and defense hyper-parameter, which are \textit{not even rooted from delicate adaptive attacks}. We demonstrate how to trivially bypass them aligned with their respective threat models by simply varying aforementioned factors. Particularly, for each defense, formal proofs or empirical studies are used to reveal its two non-robust cases where it is not as robust as it claims or expects, especially the recent MNTD. This work highlights the necessity of thoroughly evaluating the robustness of backdoor countermeasures to avoid their misleading security implications in unknown non-robust cases.
summary: Since Deep Learning (DL) backdoor attacks have been revealed as one of the most insidious adversarial attacks, a number of countermeasures have been developed with certain assumptions defined in their respective threat models. However, the robustness of these countermeasures is inadvertently ignored, which can introduce severe consequences, e.g., a countermeasure can be misused and result in a false implication of backdoor detection. For the first time, we critically examine the robustness of existing backdoor countermeasures with an initial focus on three influential model-inspection ones that are Neural Cleanse (S&P'19), ABS (CCS'19), and MNTD (S&P'21). Although the three countermeasures claim that they work well under their respective threat models, they have inherent unexplored non-robust cases depending on factors such as given tasks, model architectures, datasets, and defense hyper-parameter, which are \textit{not even rooted from delicate adaptive attacks}. We demonstrate how to trivially bypass them aligned with their respective threat models by simply varying aforementioned factors. Particularly, for each defense, formal proofs or empirical studies are used to reveal its two non-robust cases where it is not as robust as it claims or expects, especially the recent MNTD. This work highlights the necessity of thoroughly evaluating the robustness of backdoor countermeasures to avoid their misleading security implications in unknown non-robust cases.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习 (DL) 后门攻击已被揭露为最阴险的对抗性攻击之一，因此根据各自威胁模型中定义的某些假设，开发了许多对策。然而，这些对策的鲁棒性被无意中忽视，这可能会带来严重的后果，例如，对策可能被误用并导致后门检测的错误暗示。我们第一次批判性地检查现有后门对策的稳健性，最初重点关注三个有影响力的模型检查措施，即 Neural Cleanse (S&P'19)、ABS (CCS'19) 和 MNTD (S&P'21)。尽管这三种对策声称它们在各自的威胁模型下工作良好，但它们具有固有的未经探索的非鲁棒性情况，具体取决于给定任务、模型架构、数据集和防御超参数等因素，而这些因素\textit{甚至不是源于微妙的自适应攻击}。我们演示了如何通过简单地改变上述因素来轻松绕过它们，并与它们各自的威胁模型保持一致。特别是，对于每一个辩护，都使用形式证明或实证研究来揭示其两个非稳健案例，即它并不像其声称或期望的那样稳健，尤其是最近的 MNTD。这项工作强调了彻底评估后门对策的稳健性的必要性，以避免其在未知的非稳健情况下产生误导性的安全影响。

AI.tldr: 本文首次对现有深度学习后门防御方法的鲁棒性进行批判性评估，重点分析了三种主流模型检测方法在不同条件下的非鲁棒性案例。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御方法在威胁模型中存在未被重视的鲁棒性缺陷，可能导致误判和安全误导，亟需系统性评估其实际防御效果。
AI.method: 通过调整任务类型、模型架构、数据集和防御超参数等非攻击性因素，结合形式化证明与实证研究揭示三种防御方法（Neural Cleanse、ABS、MNTD）的失效场景。
AI.result: 发现所有防御方法均存在可被简单绕过的非鲁棒案例，尤其近期提出的MNTD防御在特定条件下表现显著缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 必须建立更全面的鲁棒性评估框架，避免防御方法在未知场景中产生误导性安全结论。

search_text: Towards A Critical Evaluation of Robustness for Deep Learning Backdoor Countermeasures 对深度学习后门对策的稳健性进行批判性评估 Since Deep Learning (DL) backdoor attacks have been revealed as one of the most insidious adversarial attacks, a number of countermeasures have been developed with certain assumptions defined in their respective threat models. However, the robustness of these countermeasures is inadvertently ignored, which can introduce severe consequences, e.g., a countermeasure can be misused and result in a false implication of backdoor detection. For the first time, we critically examine the robustness of existing backdoor countermeasures with an initial focus on three influential model-inspection ones that are Neural Cleanse (S&P'19), ABS (CCS'19), and MNTD (S&P'21). Although the three countermeasures claim that they work well under their respective threat models, they have inherent unexplored non-robust cases depending on factors such as given tasks, model architectures, datasets, and defense hyper-parameter, which are \textit{not even rooted from delicate adaptive attacks}. We demonstrate how to trivially bypass them aligned with their respective threat models by simply varying aforementioned factors. Particularly, for each defense, formal proofs or empirical studies are used to reveal its two non-robust cases where it is not as robust as it claims or expects, especially the recent MNTD. This work highlights the necessity of thoroughly evaluating the robustness of backdoor countermeasures to avoid their misleading security implications in unknown non-robust cases. 由于深度学习 (DL) 后门攻击已被揭露为最阴险的对抗性攻击之一，因此根据各自威胁模型中定义的某些假设，开发了许多对策。然而，这些对策的鲁棒性被无意中忽视，这可能会带来严重的后果，例如，对策可能被误用并导致后门检测的错误暗示。我们第一次批判性地检查现有后门对策的稳健性，最初重点关注三个有影响力的模型检查措施，即 Neural Cleanse (S&P'19)、ABS (CCS'19) 和 MNTD (S&P'21)。尽管这三种对策声称它们在各自的威胁模型下工作良好，但它们具有固有的未经探索的非鲁棒性情况，具体取决于给定任务、模型架构、数据集和防御超参数等因素，而这些因素\textit{甚至不是源于微妙的自适应攻击}。我们演示了如何通过简单地改变上述因素来轻松绕过它们，并与它们各自的威胁模型保持一致。特别是，对于每一个辩护，都使用形式证明或实证研究来揭示其两个非稳健案例，即它并不像其声称或期望的那样稳健，尤其是最近的 MNTD。这项工作强调了彻底评估后门对策的稳健性的必要性，以避免其在未知的非稳健情况下产生误导性的安全影响。 本文首次对现有深度学习后门防御方法的鲁棒性进行批判性评估，重点分析了三种主流模型检测方法在不同条件下的非鲁棒性案例。 Huming Qiu,Hua Ma,Zhi Zhang,Alsharif Abuadbba,Wei Kang,Anmin Fu,Yansong Gao cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Junyu Luo,Jiahui Fu,Xianghao Kong,Chen Gao,Haibing Ren,Hao Shen,Huaxia Xia,Si Liu
title: 3D-SPS: Single-Stage 3D Visual Grounding via Referred Point Progressive Selection
title_zh: 3D-SPS：通过参考点渐进选择进行单级 3D 视觉接地
abstract: 3D visual grounding aims to locate the referred target object in 3D point cloud scenes according to a free-form language description. Previous methods mostly follow a two-stage paradigm, i.e., language-irrelevant detection and cross-modal matching, which is limited by the isolated architecture. In such a paradigm, the detector needs to sample keypoints from raw point clouds due to the inherent properties of 3D point clouds (irregular and large-scale), to generate the corresponding object proposal for each keypoint. However, sparse proposals may leave out the target in detection, while dense proposals may confuse the matching model. Moreover, the language-irrelevant detection stage can only sample a small proportion of keypoints on the target, deteriorating the target prediction. In this paper, we propose a 3D Single-Stage Referred Point Progressive Selection (3D-SPS) method, which progressively selects keypoints with the guidance of language and directly locates the target. Specifically, we propose a Description-aware Keypoint Sampling (DKS) module to coarsely focus on the points of language-relevant objects, which are significant clues for grounding. Besides, we devise a Target-oriented Progressive Mining (TPM) module to finely concentrate on the points of the target, which is enabled by progressive intra-modal relation modeling and inter-modal target mining. 3D-SPS bridges the gap between detection and matching in the 3D visual grounding task, localizing the target at a single stage. Experiments demonstrate that 3D-SPS achieves state-of-the-art performance on both ScanRefer and Nr3D/Sr3D datasets.
summary: 3D visual grounding aims to locate the referred target object in 3D point cloud scenes according to a free-form language description. Previous methods mostly follow a two-stage paradigm, i.e., language-irrelevant detection and cross-modal matching, which is limited by the isolated architecture. In such a paradigm, the detector needs to sample keypoints from raw point clouds due to the inherent properties of 3D point clouds (irregular and large-scale), to generate the corresponding object proposal for each keypoint. However, sparse proposals may leave out the target in detection, while dense proposals may confuse the matching model. Moreover, the language-irrelevant detection stage can only sample a small proportion of keypoints on the target, deteriorating the target prediction. In this paper, we propose a 3D Single-Stage Referred Point Progressive Selection (3D-SPS) method, which progressively selects keypoints with the guidance of language and directly locates the target. Specifically, we propose a Description-aware Keypoint Sampling (DKS) module to coarsely focus on the points of language-relevant objects, which are significant clues for grounding. Besides, we devise a Target-oriented Progressive Mining (TPM) module to finely concentrate on the points of the target, which is enabled by progressive intra-modal relation modeling and inter-modal target mining. 3D-SPS bridges the gap between detection and matching in the 3D visual grounding task, localizing the target at a single stage. Experiments demonstrate that 3D-SPS achieves state-of-the-art performance on both ScanRefer and Nr3D/Sr3D datasets.
abstract_zh: 3D视觉定位旨在根据自由形式的语言描述在3D点云场景中定位参考目标对象。以前的方法大多遵循两阶段范式，即与语言无关的检测和跨模态匹配，这受到孤立架构的限制。在这样的范例中，由于 3D 点云的固有特性（不规则且大规模），检测器需要从原始点云中采样关键点，为每个关键点生成相应的对象建议。然而，稀疏提案可能会遗漏检测中的目标，而密集提案可能会混淆匹配模型。此外，与语言无关的检测阶段只能对目标上的一小部分关键点进行采样，从而恶化了目标预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种3D单阶段参考点渐进选择（3D-SPS）方法，该方法在语言的指导下逐步选择关键点并直接定位目标。具体来说，我们提出了一个描述感知关键点采样（DKS）模块，以粗略地关注与语言相关的对象的点，这是接地的重要线索。此外，我们设计了一个面向目标的渐进式挖掘（TPM）模块，通过渐进式模内关系建模和跨模态目标挖掘来精细地集中目标的点。 3D-SPS 弥合了 3D 视觉基础任务中检测和匹配之间的差距，在单个阶段定位目标。实验表明，3D-SPS 在 ScanRefer 和 Nr3D/Sr3D 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单阶段3D视觉定位方法3D-SPS，通过语言引导的点渐进选择实现3D点云场景中目标物体的精确定位。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段方法存在检测阶段与匹配阶段分离的问题，导致关键点采样稀疏或密集时定位效果下降，且语言无关检测阶段难以有效聚焦目标。
AI.method: 设计包含描述感知关键点采样模块(DKS)和目标导向渐进挖掘模块(TPM)的3D-SPS框架，通过语言引导逐步筛选关键点，实现单阶段目标定位。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D/Sr3D数据集上达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 3D-SPS通过单阶段架构有效融合语言信息与点云特征，解决了传统方法中检测与匹配分离导致的性能瓶颈。

title: TangoBERT: Reducing Inference Cost by using Cascaded Architecture
title_zh: TangoBERT：使用级联架构降低推理成本
abstract: The remarkable success of large transformer-based models such as BERT, RoBERTa and XLNet in many NLP tasks comes with a large increase in monetary and environmental cost due to their high computational load and energy consumption. In order to reduce this computational load in inference time, we present TangoBERT, a cascaded model architecture in which instances are first processed by an efficient but less accurate first tier model, and only part of those instances are additionally processed by a less efficient but more accurate second tier model. The decision of whether to apply the second tier model is based on a confidence score produced by the first tier model. Our simple method has several appealing practical advantages compared to standard cascading approaches based on multi-layered transformer models. First, it enables higher speedup gains (average lower latency). Second, it takes advantage of batch size optimization for cascading, which increases the relative inference cost reductions. We report TangoBERT inference CPU speedup on four text classification GLUE tasks and on one reading comprehension task. Experimental results show that TangoBERT outperforms efficient early exit baseline models; on the the SST-2 task, it achieves an accuracy of 93.9% with a CPU speedup of 8.2x.
summary: The remarkable success of large transformer-based models such as BERT, RoBERTa and XLNet in many NLP tasks comes with a large increase in monetary and environmental cost due to their high computational load and energy consumption. In order to reduce this computational load in inference time, we present TangoBERT, a cascaded model architecture in which instances are first processed by an efficient but less accurate first tier model, and only part of those instances are additionally processed by a less efficient but more accurate second tier model. The decision of whether to apply the second tier model is based on a confidence score produced by the first tier model. Our simple method has several appealing practical advantages compared to standard cascading approaches based on multi-layered transformer models. First, it enables higher speedup gains (average lower latency). Second, it takes advantage of batch size optimization for cascading, which increases the relative inference cost reductions. We report TangoBERT inference CPU speedup on four text classification GLUE tasks and on one reading comprehension task. Experimental results show that TangoBERT outperforms efficient early exit baseline models; on the the SST-2 task, it achieves an accuracy of 93.9% with a CPU speedup of 8.2x.
abstract_zh: 基于大型 Transformer 的模型（例如 BERT、RoBERTa 和 XLNet）在许多 NLP 任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于其高计算负载和能源消耗，货币和环境成本大幅增加。为了减少推理时间的计算负载，我们提出了 TangoBERT，这是一种级联模型架构，其中实例首先由高效但不太准确的第一层模型处理，并且只有部分实例由效率较低但更准确的第二层模型额外处理。是否应用第二层模型的决定基于第一层模型产生的置信度得分。与基于多层变压器模型的标准级联方法相比，我们的简单方法具有几个吸引人的实际优势。首先，它可以实现更高的加速增益（平均更低的延迟）。其次，它利用级联的批量大小优化，这增加了相对推理成本的降低。我们报告了在四个文本分类 GLUE 任务和一个阅读理解任务上 TangoBERT 推理 CPU 加速情况。实验结果表明，TangoBERT 优于高效的早期退出基线模型；在 SST-2 任务上，它的准确率达到 93.9%，CPU 加速率为 8.2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TangoBERT，一种级联架构模型，通过分层处理实例以降低推理计算成本。
AI.motivation: 大型Transformer模型（如BERT）在NLP任务中表现优异，但其高计算负载和能耗导致显著的经济和环境成本，需寻找更高效的推理方案。
AI.method: 采用双层级联架构：第一层为高效但精度较低的模型，第二层为精度更高但更耗资源的模型。根据第一层的置信度评分决定是否触发第二层处理，并利用批量优化提升级联效率。
AI.result: 在四个GLUE文本分类任务和一个阅读理解任务中，TangoBERT在SST-2任务上实现93.9%准确率，CPU推理速度提升8.2倍，优于早期退出基线模型。
AI.conclusion: TangoBERT通过级联架构有效降低推理成本，在保持较高精度的同时实现显著加速，为高效模型推理提供了实用方案。

search_text: TangoBERT: Reducing Inference Cost by using Cascaded Architecture TangoBERT：使用级联架构降低推理成本 The remarkable success of large transformer-based models such as BERT, RoBERTa and XLNet in many NLP tasks comes with a large increase in monetary and environmental cost due to their high computational load and energy consumption. In order to reduce this computational load in inference time, we present TangoBERT, a cascaded model architecture in which instances are first processed by an efficient but less accurate first tier model, and only part of those instances are additionally processed by a less efficient but more accurate second tier model. The decision of whether to apply the second tier model is based on a confidence score produced by the first tier model. Our simple method has several appealing practical advantages compared to standard cascading approaches based on multi-layered transformer models. First, it enables higher speedup gains (average lower latency). Second, it takes advantage of batch size optimization for cascading, which increases the relative inference cost reductions. We report TangoBERT inference CPU speedup on four text classification GLUE tasks and on one reading comprehension task. Experimental results show that TangoBERT outperforms efficient early exit baseline models; on the the SST-2 task, it achieves an accuracy of 93.9% with a CPU speedup of 8.2x. 基于大型 Transformer 的模型（例如 BERT、RoBERTa 和 XLNet）在许多 NLP 任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于其高计算负载和能源消耗，货币和环境成本大幅增加。为了减少推理时间的计算负载，我们提出了 TangoBERT，这是一种级联模型架构，其中实例首先由高效但不太准确的第一层模型处理，并且只有部分实例由效率较低但更准确的第二层模型额外处理。是否应用第二层模型的决定基于第一层模型产生的置信度得分。与基于多层变压器模型的标准级联方法相比，我们的简单方法具有几个吸引人的实际优势。首先，它可以实现更高的加速增益（平均更低的延迟）。其次，它利用级联的批量大小优化，这增加了相对推理成本的降低。我们报告了在四个文本分类 GLUE 任务和一个阅读理解任务上 TangoBERT 推理 CPU 加速情况。实验结果表明，TangoBERT 优于高效的早期退出基线模型；在 SST-2 任务上，它的准确率达到 93.9%，CPU 加速率为 8.2 倍。 本文提出TangoBERT，一种级联架构模型，通过分层处理实例以降低推理计算成本。 Jonathan Mamou,Oren Pereg,Moshe Wasserblat,Roy Schwartz cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chen Chen,Yuchen Hu,Nana Hou,Xiaofeng Qi,Heqing Zou,Eng Siong Chng
title: Self-critical Sequence Training for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 自动语音识别的自我批评序列训练
abstract: Although automatic speech recognition (ASR) task has gained remarkable success by sequence-to-sequence models, there are two main mismatches between its training and testing that might lead to performance degradation: 1) The typically used cross-entropy criterion aims to maximize log-likelihood of the training data, while the performance is evaluated by word error rate (WER), not log-likelihood; 2) The teacher-forcing method leads to the dependence on ground truth during training, which means that model has never been exposed to its own prediction before testing. In this paper, we propose an optimization method called self-critical sequence training (SCST) to make the training procedure much closer to the testing phase. As a reinforcement learning (RL) based method, SCST utilizes a customized reward function to associate the training criterion and WER. Furthermore, it removes the reliance on teacher-forcing and harmonizes the model with respect to its inference procedure. We conducted experiments on both clean and noisy speech datasets, and the results show that the proposed SCST respectively achieves 8.7% and 7.8% relative improvements over the baseline in terms of WER.
summary: Although automatic speech recognition (ASR) task has gained remarkable success by sequence-to-sequence models, there are two main mismatches between its training and testing that might lead to performance degradation: 1) The typically used cross-entropy criterion aims to maximize log-likelihood of the training data, while the performance is evaluated by word error rate (WER), not log-likelihood; 2) The teacher-forcing method leads to the dependence on ground truth during training, which means that model has never been exposed to its own prediction before testing. In this paper, we propose an optimization method called self-critical sequence training (SCST) to make the training procedure much closer to the testing phase. As a reinforcement learning (RL) based method, SCST utilizes a customized reward function to associate the training criterion and WER. Furthermore, it removes the reliance on teacher-forcing and harmonizes the model with respect to its inference procedure. We conducted experiments on both clean and noisy speech datasets, and the results show that the proposed SCST respectively achieves 8.7% and 7.8% relative improvements over the baseline in terms of WER.
abstract_zh: 尽管自动语音识别（ASR）任务通过序列到序列模型取得了显着的成功，但其训练和测试之间存在两个主要的不匹配可能导致性能下降：1）通常使用的交叉熵准则旨在最大化训练数据的对数似然，而性能是通过单词错误率（WER）而不是对数似然来评估的； 2）教师强制方法导致训练过程中对真实情况的依赖，这意味着模型在测试之前从未接触过自己的预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为自临界序列训练（SCST）的优化方法，使训练过程更接近测试阶段。作为一种基于强化学习 (RL) 的方法，SCST 利用定制的奖励函数将训练标准和 WER 关联起来。此外，它消除了对教师强制的依赖，并协调了模型的推理过程。我们在干净和嘈杂的语音数据集上进行了实验，结果表明，所提出的 SCST 在 WER 方面比基线分别实现了 8.7% 和 7.8% 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自批判序列训练（SCST）方法，解决自动语音识别（ASR）中训练与测试阶段的不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR训练使用交叉熵最大化对数似然，而评估指标为词错误率（WER），且依赖教师强制导致模型未接触自身预测，影响测试表现。
AI.method: 基于强化学习的SCST方法，通过自定义奖励函数关联训练准则与WER，并消除教师强制依赖，使模型与推理过程一致。
AI.result: 在干净和嘈杂语音数据集上，SCST分别实现8.7%和7.8%的相对WER改进。
AI.conclusion: SCST有效弥合了ASR训练与测试阶段的差异，显著提升了模型性能。

title: What Matters in Language Conditioned Robotic Imitation Learning over Unstructured Data
title_zh: 非结构化数据的语言条件机器人模仿学习中最重要的是什么
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL). Codebase and trained models available at http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL). Codebase and trained models available at http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de
abstract: A long-standing goal in robotics is to build robots that can perform a wide range of daily tasks from perceptions obtained with their onboard sensors and specified only via natural language. While recently substantial advances have been achieved in language-driven robotics by leveraging end-to-end learning from pixels, there is no clear and well-understood process for making various design choices due to the underlying variation in setups. In this paper, we conduct an extensive study of the most critical challenges in learning language conditioned policies from offline free-form imitation datasets. We further identify architectural and algorithmic techniques that improve performance, such as a hierarchical decomposition of the robot control learning, a multimodal transformer encoder, discrete latent plans and a self-supervised contrastive loss that aligns video and language representations. By combining the results of our investigation with our improved model components, we are able to present a novel approach that significantly outperforms the state of the art on the challenging language conditioned long-horizon robot manipulation CALVIN benchmark. We have open-sourced our implementation to facilitate future research in learning to perform many complex manipulation skills in a row specified with natural language. Codebase and trained models available at http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de
summary: A long-standing goal in robotics is to build robots that can perform a wide range of daily tasks from perceptions obtained with their onboard sensors and specified only via natural language. While recently substantial advances have been achieved in language-driven robotics by leveraging end-to-end learning from pixels, there is no clear and well-understood process for making various design choices due to the underlying variation in setups. In this paper, we conduct an extensive study of the most critical challenges in learning language conditioned policies from offline free-form imitation datasets. We further identify architectural and algorithmic techniques that improve performance, such as a hierarchical decomposition of the robot control learning, a multimodal transformer encoder, discrete latent plans and a self-supervised contrastive loss that aligns video and language representations. By combining the results of our investigation with our improved model components, we are able to present a novel approach that significantly outperforms the state of the art on the challenging language conditioned long-horizon robot manipulation CALVIN benchmark. We have open-sourced our implementation to facilitate future research in learning to perform many complex manipulation skills in a row specified with natural language. Codebase and trained models available at http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de
abstract_zh: 机器人技术的一个长期目标是制造能够根据机载传感器获得的感知执行各种日常任务的机器人，并且仅通过自然语言指定。虽然最近通过利用像素的端到端学习在语言驱动的机器人技术方面取得了实质性进展，但由于设置的潜在变化，没有清晰且易于理解的过程来做出各种设计选择。在本文中，我们对从离线自由形式模仿数据集中学习语言条件策略的最关键挑战进行了广泛的研究。我们进一步确定了提高性能的架构和算法技术，例如机器人控制学习的分层分解、多模态变压器编码器、离散潜在计划以及对齐视频和语言表示的自监督对比损失。通过将我们的调查结果与改进的模型组件相结合，我们能够提出一种新颖的方法，该方法在具有挑战性的语言条件长视野机器人操作 CALVIN 基准测试中显着优于现有技术。我们已经开源了我们的实现，以促进未来的研究，学习如何连续执行用自然语言指定的许多复杂的操作技能。代码库和训练模型可在 http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何从非结构化数据中学习语言条件下的机器人模仿策略，并提出了一种结合多种改进技术的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在语言驱动的机器人学习中缺乏明确的设计选择流程，难以有效处理自然语言指令与复杂任务的对齐问题。
AI.method: 采用分层控制架构、多模态Transformer编码器、离散潜在计划及自监督对比损失，通过离线模仿数据学习语言条件策略。
AI.result: 提出的方法在CALVIN基准测试中显著优于现有最先进模型，验证了关键技术和设计选择的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统分析关键因素并结合改进模型组件，提出了高效的语言条件机器人学习框架，开源代码推动了该领域研究进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究了如何从非结构化数据中学习语言条件下的机器人模仿策略，并提出了一种结合多种改进技术的新方法。

search_text: What Matters in Language Conditioned Robotic Imitation Learning over Unstructured Data 非结构化数据的语言条件机器人模仿学习中最重要的是什么 A long-standing goal in robotics is to build robots that can perform a wide range of daily tasks from perceptions obtained with their onboard sensors and specified only via natural language. While recently substantial advances have been achieved in language-driven robotics by leveraging end-to-end learning from pixels, there is no clear and well-understood process for making various design choices due to the underlying variation in setups. In this paper, we conduct an extensive study of the most critical challenges in learning language conditioned policies from offline free-form imitation datasets. We further identify architectural and algorithmic techniques that improve performance, such as a hierarchical decomposition of the robot control learning, a multimodal transformer encoder, discrete latent plans and a self-supervised contrastive loss that aligns video and language representations. By combining the results of our investigation with our improved model components, we are able to present a novel approach that significantly outperforms the state of the art on the challenging language conditioned long-horizon robot manipulation CALVIN benchmark. We have open-sourced our implementation to facilitate future research in learning to perform many complex manipulation skills in a row specified with natural language. Codebase and trained models available at http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de 机器人技术的一个长期目标是制造能够根据机载传感器获得的感知执行各种日常任务的机器人，并且仅通过自然语言指定。虽然最近通过利用像素的端到端学习在语言驱动的机器人技术方面取得了实质性进展，但由于设置的潜在变化，没有清晰且易于理解的过程来做出各种设计选择。在本文中，我们对从离线自由形式模仿数据集中学习语言条件策略的最关键挑战进行了广泛的研究。我们进一步确定了提高性能的架构和算法技术，例如机器人控制学习的分层分解、多模态变压器编码器、离散潜在计划以及对齐视频和语言表示的自监督对比损失。通过将我们的调查结果与改进的模型组件相结合，我们能够提出一种新颖的方法，该方法在具有挑战性的语言条件长视野机器人操作 CALVIN 基准测试中显着优于现有技术。我们已经开源了我们的实现，以促进未来的研究，学习如何连续执行用自然语言指定的许多复杂的操作技能。代码库和训练模型可在 http://hulc.cs.uni-freiburg.de 获取 本文研究了如何从非结构化数据中学习语言条件下的机器人模仿策略，并提出了一种结合多种改进技术的新方法。 Oier Mees,Lukas Hermann,Wolfram Burgard cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Large-scale multi-objective influence maximisation with network downscaling
title_zh: 通过网络缩小规模实现大规模多目标影响最大化
abstract: Finding the most influential nodes in a network is a computationally hard problem with several possible applications in various kinds of network-based problems. While several methods have been proposed for tackling the influence maximisation (IM) problem, their runtime typically scales poorly when the network size increases. Here, we propose an original method, based on network downscaling, that allows a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) to solve the IM problem on a reduced scale network, while preserving the relevant properties of the original network. The downscaled solution is then upscaled to the original network, using a mechanism based on centrality metrics such as PageRank. Our results on eight large networks (including two with $\sim$50k nodes) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method with a more than 10-fold runtime gain compared to the time needed on the original network, and an up to $82\%$ time reduction compared to CELF.
summary: Finding the most influential nodes in a network is a computationally hard problem with several possible applications in various kinds of network-based problems. While several methods have been proposed for tackling the influence maximisation (IM) problem, their runtime typically scales poorly when the network size increases. Here, we propose an original method, based on network downscaling, that allows a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) to solve the IM problem on a reduced scale network, while preserving the relevant properties of the original network. The downscaled solution is then upscaled to the original network, using a mechanism based on centrality metrics such as PageRank. Our results on eight large networks (including two with $\sim$50k nodes) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method with a more than 10-fold runtime gain compared to the time needed on the original network, and an up to $82\%$ time reduction compared to CELF.
abstract_zh: 寻找网络中最有影响力的节点是一个计算难题，在各种基于网络的问题中都有多种可能的应用。虽然已经提出了几种方法来解决影响最大化（IM）问题，但当网络规模增加时，它们的运行时间通常会扩展得很差。在这里，我们提出了一种基于网络缩小规模的原始方法，允许多目标进化算法（MOEA）在缩小规模的网络上解决 IM 问题，同时保留原始网络的相关属性。然后，使用基于中心性指标（例如 PageRank）的机制，将缩小规模的解决方案扩大到原始网络。我们在 8 个大型网络（包括两个具有 $\sim$50k 节点）上的结果证明了所提出方法的有效性，与原始网络所需的时间相比，运行时间增益超过 10 倍，与 CELF 相比，时间减少了高达 $82\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网络降尺度的多目标进化算法，用于解决大规模网络中的影响力最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有影响力最大化方法在处理大规模网络时计算效率低下，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 通过网络降尺度技术构建简化网络，利用多目标进化算法求解后，结合PageRank等中心性指标将结果映射回原网络。
AI.result: 在包含5万节点的8个大型网络上验证，相比原网络计算速度提升10倍，相比CELF算法节省82%时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了计算效率与解决方案质量，为大规模网络影响力优化提供了可行方案。

title: Distributed Coalgebraic Partition Refinement
title_zh: 分布式代数划分细化
abstract: Partition refinement is a method for minimizing automata and transition systems of various types. Recently, a new partition refinement algorithm and associated tool CoPaR were developed that are generic in the transition type of the input system and match the theoretical run time of the best known algorithms for many concrete system types. Genericity is achieved by modelling transition types as functors on sets and systems as coalgebras. Experimentation has shown that memory consumption is a bottleneck for handling systems with a large state space, while running times are fast. We have therefore extended an algorithm due to Blom and Orzan, which is suitable for a distributed implementation to the coalgebraic level of genericity, and implemented it in CoPaR. Experiments show that this allows to handle much larger state spaces. Running times are low in most experiments, but there is a significant penalty for some.
summary: Partition refinement is a method for minimizing automata and transition systems of various types. Recently, a new partition refinement algorithm and associated tool CoPaR were developed that are generic in the transition type of the input system and match the theoretical run time of the best known algorithms for many concrete system types. Genericity is achieved by modelling transition types as functors on sets and systems as coalgebras. Experimentation has shown that memory consumption is a bottleneck for handling systems with a large state space, while running times are fast. We have therefore extended an algorithm due to Blom and Orzan, which is suitable for a distributed implementation to the coalgebraic level of genericity, and implemented it in CoPaR. Experiments show that this allows to handle much larger state spaces. Running times are low in most experiments, but there is a significant penalty for some.
abstract_zh: 分区细化是一种最小化各种类型的自动机和转换系统的方法。最近，开发了一种新的分区细化算法和相关工具 CoPaR，它们在输入系统的转换类型中是通用的，并且与许多具体系统类型的最著名算法的理论运行时间相匹配。通用性是通过将转换类型建模为集合上的函子和将系统建模为余代数来实现的。实验表明，内存消耗是处理具有大状态空间的系统的瓶颈，而运行时间却很快。因此，我们扩展了 Blom 和 Orzan 的算法，该算法适合于通用性的煤代数级别的分布式实现，并在 CoPaR 中实现。实验表明，这可以处理更大的状态空间。大多数实验的运行时间都很短，但有些实验会受到很大的惩罚。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式泛型分区细化算法，通过扩展Blom和Orzan的算法到coalgebraic层面，以解决大规模状态空间系统的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分区细化工具在处理大型状态空间时面临内存消耗过大的瓶颈，需通过分布式方法提升处理能力。
AI.method: 将Blom和Orzan的分布式算法扩展至泛型coalgebraic框架，并集成到工具CoPaR中实现。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能处理更大状态空间，多数情况下运行时间较低，但特定场景存在显著性能惩罚。
AI.conclusion: 分布式泛型算法有效扩展了系统处理能力，但需进一步优化以减少特定情况的性能损失。

authors_text: Wenao Ma,Shuang Zheng,Lei Zhang,Huimao Zhang,Qi Dou
title: Rapid model transfer for medical image segmentation via iterative human-in-the-loop update: from labelled public to unlabelled clinical datasets for multi-organ segmentation in CT
title_zh: 通过迭代人机循环更新进行医学图像分割的快速模型传输：从标记的公共数据集到未标记的临床数据集，用于 CT 中的多器官分割
abstract: Despite the remarkable success on medical image analysis with deep learning, it is still under exploration regarding how to rapidly transfer AI models from one dataset to another for clinical applications. This paper presents a novel and generic human-in-the-loop scheme for efficiently transferring a segmentation model from a small-scale labelled dataset to a larger-scale unlabelled dataset for multi-organ segmentation in CT. To achieve this, we propose to use an igniter network which can learn from a small-scale labelled dataset and generate coarse annotations to start the process of human-machine interaction. Then, we use a sustainer network for our larger-scale dataset, and iteratively updated it on the new annotated data. Moreover, we propose a flexible labelling strategy for the annotator to reduce the initial annotation workload. The model performance and the time cost of annotation in each subject evaluated on our private dataset are reported and analysed. The results show that our scheme can not only improve the performance by 19.7% on Dice, but also expedite the cost time of manual labelling from 13.87 min to 1.51 min per CT volume during the model transfer, demonstrating the clinical usefulness with promising potentials.
summary: Despite the remarkable success on medical image analysis with deep learning, it is still under exploration regarding how to rapidly transfer AI models from one dataset to another for clinical applications. This paper presents a novel and generic human-in-the-loop scheme for efficiently transferring a segmentation model from a small-scale labelled dataset to a larger-scale unlabelled dataset for multi-organ segmentation in CT. To achieve this, we propose to use an igniter network which can learn from a small-scale labelled dataset and generate coarse annotations to start the process of human-machine interaction. Then, we use a sustainer network for our larger-scale dataset, and iteratively updated it on the new annotated data. Moreover, we propose a flexible labelling strategy for the annotator to reduce the initial annotation workload. The model performance and the time cost of annotation in each subject evaluated on our private dataset are reported and analysed. The results show that our scheme can not only improve the performance by 19.7% on Dice, but also expedite the cost time of manual labelling from 13.87 min to 1.51 min per CT volume during the model transfer, demonstrating the clinical usefulness with promising potentials.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在医学图像分析方面取得了巨大成功，但如何将人工智能模型从一个数据集快速转移到另一个数据集以进行临床应用仍在探索中。本文提出了一种新颖且通用的人机交互方案，用于有效地将分割模型从小规模标记数据集转移到更大规模的未标记数据集，以进行 CT 中的多器官分割。为了实现这一目标，我们建议使用一个点火器网络，它可以从小规模的标记数据集中学习并生成粗略的注释来启动人机交互的过程。然后，我们对更大规模的数据集使用维持网络，并根据新的注释数据迭代更新它。此外，我们为注释者提出了一种灵活的标记策略，以减少初始注释工作量。报告并分析了在我们的私人数据集上评估的每个主题的模型性能和注释时间成本。结果表明，我们的方案不仅可以将 Dice 上的性能提高 19.7%，而且还可以将模型转移过程中每 CT 体积的手动标记成本时间从 13.87 分钟缩短到 1.51 分钟，展示了临床实用性和广阔的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种人机交互的快速模型迁移方法，将小规模标注的公开数据集医学图像分割模型迁移至大规模未标注的临床数据集，用于CT多器官分割。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分析中取得进展，但如何快速将模型从标注数据集迁移至临床未标注数据集仍是挑战，需减少人工标注负担并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计igniter网络从少量标注数据生成粗略标注启动迁移，通过sustainer网络迭代更新模型；采用灵活标注策略降低初始标注工作量。
AI.result: 在私有数据集上Dice指标提升19.7%，单个体积手动标注时间从13.87分钟缩短至1.51分钟，验证了方法的临床实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升模型迁移效率与性能，显著减少标注时间，为临床医学图像分割提供可行方案。

search_text: Rapid model transfer for medical image segmentation via iterative human-in-the-loop update: from labelled public to unlabelled clinical datasets for multi-organ segmentation in CT 通过迭代人机循环更新进行医学图像分割的快速模型传输：从标记的公共数据集到未标记的临床数据集，用于 CT 中的多器官分割 Despite the remarkable success on medical image analysis with deep learning, it is still under exploration regarding how to rapidly transfer AI models from one dataset to another for clinical applications. This paper presents a novel and generic human-in-the-loop scheme for efficiently transferring a segmentation model from a small-scale labelled dataset to a larger-scale unlabelled dataset for multi-organ segmentation in CT. To achieve this, we propose to use an igniter network which can learn from a small-scale labelled dataset and generate coarse annotations to start the process of human-machine interaction. Then, we use a sustainer network for our larger-scale dataset, and iteratively updated it on the new annotated data. Moreover, we propose a flexible labelling strategy for the annotator to reduce the initial annotation workload. The model performance and the time cost of annotation in each subject evaluated on our private dataset are reported and analysed. The results show that our scheme can not only improve the performance by 19.7% on Dice, but also expedite the cost time of manual labelling from 13.87 min to 1.51 min per CT volume during the model transfer, demonstrating the clinical usefulness with promising potentials. 尽管深度学习在医学图像分析方面取得了巨大成功，但如何将人工智能模型从一个数据集快速转移到另一个数据集以进行临床应用仍在探索中。本文提出了一种新颖且通用的人机交互方案，用于有效地将分割模型从小规模标记数据集转移到更大规模的未标记数据集，以进行 CT 中的多器官分割。为了实现这一目标，我们建议使用一个点火器网络，它可以从小规模的标记数据集中学习并生成粗略的注释来启动人机交互的过程。然后，我们对更大规模的数据集使用维持网络，并根据新的注释数据迭代更新它。此外，我们为注释者提出了一种灵活的标记策略，以减少初始注释工作量。报告并分析了在我们的私人数据集上评估的每个主题的模型性能和注释时间成本。结果表明，我们的方案不仅可以将 Dice 上的性能提高 19.7%，而且还可以将模型转移过程中每 CT 体积的手动标记成本时间从 13.87 分钟缩短到 1.51 分钟，展示了临床实用性和广阔的前景。 本文提出一种人机交互的快速模型迁移方法，将小规模标注的公开数据集医学图像分割模型迁移至大规模未标注的临床数据集，用于CT多器官分割。 Wenao Ma,Shuang Zheng,Lei Zhang,Huimao Zhang,Qi Dou cs.CV

title: Encoding Domain Knowledge in Multi-view Latent Variable Models: A Bayesian Approach with Structured Sparsity
title_zh: 在多视图潜变量模型中编码领域知识：具有结构化稀疏性的贝叶斯方法
abstract: Many real-world systems are described not only by data from a single source but via multiple data views. In genomic medicine, for instance, patients can be characterized by data from different molecular layers. Latent variable models with structured sparsity are a commonly used tool for disentangling variation within and across data views. However, their interpretability is cumbersome since it requires a direct inspection and interpretation of each factor from domain experts. Here, we propose MuVI, a novel multi-view latent variable model based on a modified horseshoe prior for modeling structured sparsity. This facilitates the incorporation of limited and noisy domain knowledge, thereby allowing for an analysis of multi-view data in an inherently explainable manner. We demonstrate that our model (i) outperforms state-of-the-art approaches for modeling structured sparsity in terms of the reconstruction error and the precision/recall, (ii) robustly integrates noisy domain expertise in the form of feature sets, (iii) promotes the identifiability of factors and (iv) infers interpretable and biologically meaningful axes of variation in a real-world multi-view dataset of cancer patients.
summary: Many real-world systems are described not only by data from a single source but via multiple data views. In genomic medicine, for instance, patients can be characterized by data from different molecular layers. Latent variable models with structured sparsity are a commonly used tool for disentangling variation within and across data views. However, their interpretability is cumbersome since it requires a direct inspection and interpretation of each factor from domain experts. Here, we propose MuVI, a novel multi-view latent variable model based on a modified horseshoe prior for modeling structured sparsity. This facilitates the incorporation of limited and noisy domain knowledge, thereby allowing for an analysis of multi-view data in an inherently explainable manner. We demonstrate that our model (i) outperforms state-of-the-art approaches for modeling structured sparsity in terms of the reconstruction error and the precision/recall, (ii) robustly integrates noisy domain expertise in the form of feature sets, (iii) promotes the identifiability of factors and (iv) infers interpretable and biologically meaningful axes of variation in a real-world multi-view dataset of cancer patients.
abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的系统不仅通过单一来源的数据来描述，而且通过多个数据视图来描述。例如，在基因组医学中，可以通过来自不同分子层的数据来表征患者。具有结构化稀疏性的潜变量模型是一种常用的工具，用于解开数据视图内部和数据视图之间的变化。然而，它们的可解释性很麻烦，因为它需要领域专家对每个因素进行直接检查和解释。在这里，我们提出了 MuVI，一种基于改进的马蹄先验的新颖的多视图潜变量模型，用于建模结构化稀疏性。这有助于合并有限且嘈杂的领域知识，从而允许以本质上可解释的方式分析多视图数据。我们证明，我们的模型（i）在重建误差和精确度/召回率方面优于结构化稀疏性建模的最先进方法，（ii）以特征集的形式稳健地集成噪声领域专业知识，（iii）促进因素的可识别性，（iv）在癌症患者的真实多视图数据集中推断可解释且具有生物学意义的变异轴。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构稀疏性的多视图潜在变量模型MuVI，通过贝叶斯方法整合领域知识，以可解释的方式分析多视图数据。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在变量模型在处理多视图数据时可解释性差，需专家手动检验每个因子，且难以有效整合有限且嘈杂的领域知识。
AI.method: 设计基于改进的马蹄先验的MuVI模型，通过结构稀疏性建模实现领域知识的整合，提升因子可解释性与模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MuVI在重构误差、精确率/召回率上优于现有方法，能稳健整合噪声领域知识，提升因子可识别性并发现生物意义的变异轴。
AI.conclusion: MuVI为多视图数据提供了可解释且可整合领域知识的分析框架，在癌症患者真实数据中验证了其有效性。

title: Stealing and Evading Malware Classifiers and Antivirus at Low False Positive Conditions
title_zh: 在低误报情况下窃取和规避恶意软件分类器和防病毒软件
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, 8 tables. Accepted, please use the DOI/ journal for citations
comments: 20 pages, 10 figures, 8 tables. Accepted, please use the DOI/ journal for citations
abstract: Model stealing attacks have been successfully used in many machine learning domains, but there is little understanding of how these attacks work against models that perform malware detection. Malware detection and, in general, security domains have unique conditions. In particular, there are very strong requirements for low false positive rates (FPR). Antivirus products (AVs) that use machine learning are very complex systems to steal, malware binaries continually change, and the whole environment is adversarial by nature. This study evaluates active learning model stealing attacks against publicly available stand-alone machine learning malware classifiers and also against antivirus products. The study proposes a new neural network architecture for surrogate models (dualFFNN) and a new model stealing attack that combines transfer and active learning for surrogate creation (FFNN-TL). We achieved good surrogates of the stand-alone classifiers with up to 99\% agreement with the target models, using less than 4% of the original training dataset. Good surrogates of AV systems were also trained with up to 99% agreement and less than 4,000 queries. The study uses the best surrogates to generate adversarial malware to evade the target models, both stand-alone and AVs (with and without an internet connection). Results show that surrogate models can generate adversarial malware that evades the targets but with a lower success rate than directly using the target models to generate adversarial malware. Using surrogates, however, is still a good option since using the AVs for malware generation is highly time-consuming and easily detected when the AVs are connected to the internet.
summary: Model stealing attacks have been successfully used in many machine learning domains, but there is little understanding of how these attacks work against models that perform malware detection. Malware detection and, in general, security domains have unique conditions. In particular, there are very strong requirements for low false positive rates (FPR). Antivirus products (AVs) that use machine learning are very complex systems to steal, malware binaries continually change, and the whole environment is adversarial by nature. This study evaluates active learning model stealing attacks against publicly available stand-alone machine learning malware classifiers and also against antivirus products. The study proposes a new neural network architecture for surrogate models (dualFFNN) and a new model stealing attack that combines transfer and active learning for surrogate creation (FFNN-TL). We achieved good surrogates of the stand-alone classifiers with up to 99\% agreement with the target models, using less than 4% of the original training dataset. Good surrogates of AV systems were also trained with up to 99% agreement and less than 4,000 queries. The study uses the best surrogates to generate adversarial malware to evade the target models, both stand-alone and AVs (with and without an internet connection). Results show that surrogate models can generate adversarial malware that evades the targets but with a lower success rate than directly using the target models to generate adversarial malware. Using surrogates, however, is still a good option since using the AVs for malware generation is highly time-consuming and easily detected when the AVs are connected to the internet.
abstract_zh: 模型窃取攻击已成功应用于许多机器学习领域，但人们对这些攻击如何针对执行恶意软件检测的模型发挥作用知之甚少。恶意软件检测和安全域通常具有独特的条件。特别是对低误报率（FPR）有非常强烈的要求。使用机器学习的防病毒产品 (AV) 是非常复杂的窃取系统，恶意软件二进制文件不断变化，整个环境本质上是敌对的。这项研究评估了针对公开的独立机器学习恶意软件分类器以及针对防病毒产品的主动学习模型窃取攻击。该研究提出了一种新的代理模型神经网络架构（dualFFNN）和一种结合转移和主动学习来创建代理的新模型窃取攻击（FFNN-TL）。我们使用不到 4% 的原始训练数据集，实现了独立分类器的良好替代，与目标模型的一致性高达 99%。 AV 系统的良好代理也接受了高达 99% 的一致性培训，并且查询次数少于 4,000 次。该研究使用最好的代理来生成对抗性恶意软件来逃避目标模型，包括独立模型和反病毒软件（有或没有互联网连接）。结果表明，代理模型可以生成规避目标的对抗性恶意软件，但其成功率低于直接使用目标模型生成对抗性恶意软件的成功率。然而，使用代理仍然是一个不错的选择，因为使用 AV 生成恶意软件非常耗时，并且当 AV 连接到互联网时很容易被检测到。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在低误报条件下对恶意软件分类器和杀毒软件进行模型窃取和规避攻击的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有模型窃取攻击在安全领域（尤其是低误报要求的恶意软件检测）的研究不足，而杀毒软件（AV）系统复杂且环境对抗性强，需探索有效攻击手段。
AI.method: 提出双层全连接神经网络（dualFFNN）作为替代模型，并结合迁移学习与主动学习设计新型攻击方法（FFNN-TL），通过少量数据和查询生成高精度替代模型，进而生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 替代模型与目标模型达成高达99%的一致性，仅需原数据集的4%或少于4000次查询；生成的对抗恶意软件可成功规避目标模型，但成功率低于直接使用目标模型生成样本。
AI.conclusion: 替代模型在规避攻击中具有实用价值，尽管成功率略低，但相较于直接利用杀毒软件生成样本（耗时且易被检测）仍为更优选择，揭示了恶意软件检测系统的潜在漏洞。

search_text: Stealing and Evading Malware Classifiers and Antivirus at Low False Positive Conditions 在低误报情况下窃取和规避恶意软件分类器和防病毒软件 Model stealing attacks have been successfully used in many machine learning domains, but there is little understanding of how these attacks work against models that perform malware detection. Malware detection and, in general, security domains have unique conditions. In particular, there are very strong requirements for low false positive rates (FPR). Antivirus products (AVs) that use machine learning are very complex systems to steal, malware binaries continually change, and the whole environment is adversarial by nature. This study evaluates active learning model stealing attacks against publicly available stand-alone machine learning malware classifiers and also against antivirus products. The study proposes a new neural network architecture for surrogate models (dualFFNN) and a new model stealing attack that combines transfer and active learning for surrogate creation (FFNN-TL). We achieved good surrogates of the stand-alone classifiers with up to 99\% agreement with the target models, using less than 4% of the original training dataset. Good surrogates of AV systems were also trained with up to 99% agreement and less than 4,000 queries. The study uses the best surrogates to generate adversarial malware to evade the target models, both stand-alone and AVs (with and without an internet connection). Results show that surrogate models can generate adversarial malware that evades the targets but with a lower success rate than directly using the target models to generate adversarial malware. Using surrogates, however, is still a good option since using the AVs for malware generation is highly time-consuming and easily detected when the AVs are connected to the internet. 模型窃取攻击已成功应用于许多机器学习领域，但人们对这些攻击如何针对执行恶意软件检测的模型发挥作用知之甚少。恶意软件检测和安全域通常具有独特的条件。特别是对低误报率（FPR）有非常强烈的要求。使用机器学习的防病毒产品 (AV) 是非常复杂的窃取系统，恶意软件二进制文件不断变化，整个环境本质上是敌对的。这项研究评估了针对公开的独立机器学习恶意软件分类器以及针对防病毒产品的主动学习模型窃取攻击。该研究提出了一种新的代理模型神经网络架构（dualFFNN）和一种结合转移和主动学习来创建代理的新模型窃取攻击（FFNN-TL）。我们使用不到 4% 的原始训练数据集，实现了独立分类器的良好替代，与目标模型的一致性高达 99%。 AV 系统的良好代理也接受了高达 99% 的一致性培训，并且查询次数少于 4,000 次。该研究使用最好的代理来生成对抗性恶意软件来逃避目标模型，包括独立模型和反病毒软件（有或没有互联网连接）。结果表明，代理模型可以生成规避目标的对抗性恶意软件，但其成功率低于直接使用目标模型生成对抗性恶意软件的成功率。然而，使用代理仍然是一个不错的选择，因为使用 AV 生成恶意软件非常耗时，并且当 AV 连接到互联网时很容易被检测到。 该论文研究了在低误报条件下对恶意软件分类器和杀毒软件进行模型窃取和规避攻击的方法。 Maria Rigaki,Sebastian Garcia cs.CR,cs.AI

title: Ada-Detector: Adaptive Frontier Detector for Rapid Exploration
title_zh: Ada-Detector：用于快速探索的自适应前沿检测器
abstract: In this paper, we propose an efficient frontier detector method based on adaptive Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) for autonomous robot exploration. Robots can achieve real-time incremental frontier detection when they are exploring unknown environments. First, our detector adaptively adjusts the sampling space of RRT by sensing the surrounding environment structure. The adaptive sampling space can greatly improve the successful sampling rate of RRT (the ratio of the number of samples successfully added to the RRT tree to the number of sampling attempts) according to the environment structure and control the expansion bias of the RRT. Second, by generating non-uniform distributed samples, our method also solves the over-sampling problem of RRT in the sliding windows, where uniform random sampling causes over-sampling in the overlap area between two adjacent sliding windows. In this way, our detector is more inclined to sample in the latest explored area, which improves the efficiency of frontier detection and achieves incremental detection. We validated our method in three simulated benchmark scenarios. The experimental comparison shows that we reduce the frontier detection runtime by about 40% compared with the SOTA method, DSV Planner.
summary: In this paper, we propose an efficient frontier detector method based on adaptive Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT) for autonomous robot exploration. Robots can achieve real-time incremental frontier detection when they are exploring unknown environments. First, our detector adaptively adjusts the sampling space of RRT by sensing the surrounding environment structure. The adaptive sampling space can greatly improve the successful sampling rate of RRT (the ratio of the number of samples successfully added to the RRT tree to the number of sampling attempts) according to the environment structure and control the expansion bias of the RRT. Second, by generating non-uniform distributed samples, our method also solves the over-sampling problem of RRT in the sliding windows, where uniform random sampling causes over-sampling in the overlap area between two adjacent sliding windows. In this way, our detector is more inclined to sample in the latest explored area, which improves the efficiency of frontier detection and achieves incremental detection. We validated our method in three simulated benchmark scenarios. The experimental comparison shows that we reduce the frontier detection runtime by about 40% compared with the SOTA method, DSV Planner.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自适应快速探索随机树（RRT）的高效前沿检测器方法，用于自主机器人探索。机器人在探索未知环境时可以实现实时增量前沿检测。首先，我们的检测器通过感知周围环境结构自适应地调整 RRT 的采样空间。自适应采样空间可以根据环境结构极大地提高RRT的成功采样率（成功添加到RRT树中的样本数与采样尝试次数的比值），并控制RRT的扩展偏差。其次，通过生成非均匀分布样本，我们的方法还解决了滑动窗口中RRT的过采样问题，其中均匀随机采样导致两个相邻滑动窗口之间的重叠区域过采样。这样，我们的检测器更倾向于在最新探索的区域进行采样，从而提高了前沿检测的效率，实现了增量检测。我们在三个模拟基准场景中验证了我们的方法。实验对比表明，与SOTA方法DSV Planner相比，我们将前沿检测运行时间减少了约40%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于自适应RRT的高效前沿探测方法，用于自主机器人探索，实现实时增量探测。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT在未知环境探索中存在采样效率低和滑动窗口重叠区域过采样问题，需提升探测效率。
AI.method: 自适应调整RRT采样空间以提升成功率，控制扩展偏差；生成非均匀样本减少滑动窗口重叠区域过采样，侧重最新探索区域。
AI.result: 在三个模拟基准场景中验证，相比DSV Planner方法，前沿探测运行时间减少约40%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升前沿探测效率，适用于自主机器人快速探索未知环境。

title: Do You Really Mean That? Content Driven Audio-Visual Deepfake Dataset and Multimodal Method for Temporal Forgery Localization
title_zh: 你真的是这个意思吗？内容驱动的视听 Deepfake 数据集和用于时间伪造定位的多模态方法
abstract: Due to its high societal impact, deepfake detection is getting active attention in the computer vision community. Most deepfake detection methods rely on identity, facial attributes, and adversarial perturbation-based spatio-temporal modifications at the whole video or random locations while keeping the meaning of the content intact. However, a sophisticated deepfake may contain only a small segment of video/audio manipulation, through which the meaning of the content can be, for example, completely inverted from a sentiment perspective. We introduce a content-driven audio-visual deepfake dataset, termed Localized Audio Visual DeepFake (LAV-DF), explicitly designed for the task of learning temporal forgery localization. Specifically, the content-driven audio-visual manipulations are performed strategically to change the sentiment polarity of the whole video. Our baseline method for benchmarking the proposed dataset is a 3DCNN model, termed as Boundary Aware Temporal Forgery Detection (BA-TFD), which is guided via contrastive, boundary matching, and frame classification loss functions. Our extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis demonstrates the proposed method's strong performance for temporal forgery localization and deepfake detection tasks.
summary: Due to its high societal impact, deepfake detection is getting active attention in the computer vision community. Most deepfake detection methods rely on identity, facial attributes, and adversarial perturbation-based spatio-temporal modifications at the whole video or random locations while keeping the meaning of the content intact. However, a sophisticated deepfake may contain only a small segment of video/audio manipulation, through which the meaning of the content can be, for example, completely inverted from a sentiment perspective. We introduce a content-driven audio-visual deepfake dataset, termed Localized Audio Visual DeepFake (LAV-DF), explicitly designed for the task of learning temporal forgery localization. Specifically, the content-driven audio-visual manipulations are performed strategically to change the sentiment polarity of the whole video. Our baseline method for benchmarking the proposed dataset is a 3DCNN model, termed as Boundary Aware Temporal Forgery Detection (BA-TFD), which is guided via contrastive, boundary matching, and frame classification loss functions. Our extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis demonstrates the proposed method's strong performance for temporal forgery localization and deepfake detection tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于其较高的社会影响，深度伪造检测正在计算机视觉界得到积极关注。大多数深度换脸检测方法依赖于整个视频或随机位置的身份、面部属性和基于对抗性扰动的时空修改，同时保持内容含义完整。然而，复杂的深度伪造可能只包含一小部分视频/音频操作，例如，通过这些操作，可以从情感角度完全颠倒内容的含义。我们引入了一个内容驱动的视听深度伪造数据集，称为本地化视听深度伪造（LAV-DF），专门为学习时间伪造本地化任务而设计。具体来说，策略性地执行内容驱动的视听操作，以改变整个视频的情感极性。我们对所提出的数据集进行基准测试的基准方法是 3DCNN 模型，称为边界感知时间伪造检测 (BA-TFD)，它通过对比、边界匹配和帧分类损失函数进行引导。我们广泛的定量和定性分析证明了所提出的方法在时间伪造定位和深度伪造检测任务方面的强大性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个内容驱动的音频-视觉深度伪造数据集LAV-DF及多模态方法BA-TFD，用于时间伪造定位任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法难以识别仅改变视频/音频局部内容导致语义反转（如情感极性翻转）的高阶伪造手段，需针对性解决内容语义层面的检测难题。
AI.method: 构建LAV-DF数据集通过战略性局部篡改改变视频情感极性；提出BA-TFD方法，基于3DCNN结合对比学习、边界匹配和帧分类损失函数实现时序伪造定位。
AI.result: 定量与定性分析表明，BA-TFD在时间伪造定位和深度伪造检测任务中均表现出色，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过新型数据集和多模态方法推动了面向内容语义篡改的深度伪造检测研究，为时序伪造定位提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个内容驱动的音频-视觉深度伪造数据集LAV-DF及多模态方法BA-TFD，用于时间伪造定位任务。
