search_text: Do You Really Mean That? Content Driven Audio-Visual Deepfake Dataset and Multimodal Method for Temporal Forgery Localization 你真的是这个意思吗？内容驱动的视听 Deepfake 数据集和用于时间伪造定位的多模态方法 Due to its high societal impact, deepfake detection is getting active attention in the computer vision community. Most deepfake detection methods rely on identity, facial attributes, and adversarial perturbation-based spatio-temporal modifications at the whole video or random locations while keeping the meaning of the content intact. However, a sophisticated deepfake may contain only a small segment of video/audio manipulation, through which the meaning of the content can be, for example, completely inverted from a sentiment perspective. We introduce a content-driven audio-visual deepfake dataset, termed Localized Audio Visual DeepFake (LAV-DF), explicitly designed for the task of learning temporal forgery localization. Specifically, the content-driven audio-visual manipulations are performed strategically to change the sentiment polarity of the whole video. Our baseline method for benchmarking the proposed dataset is a 3DCNN model, termed as Boundary Aware Temporal Forgery Detection (BA-TFD), which is guided via contrastive, boundary matching, and frame classification loss functions. Our extensive quantitative and qualitative analysis demonstrates the proposed method's strong performance for temporal forgery localization and deepfake detection tasks. 由于其较高的社会影响，深度伪造检测正在计算机视觉界得到积极关注。大多数深度换脸检测方法依赖于整个视频或随机位置的身份、面部属性和基于对抗性扰动的时空修改，同时保持内容含义完整。然而，复杂的深度伪造可能只包含一小部分视频/音频操作，例如，通过这些操作，可以从情感角度完全颠倒内容的含义。我们引入了一个内容驱动的视听深度伪造数据集，称为本地化视听深度伪造（LAV-DF），专门为学习时间伪造本地化任务而设计。具体来说，策略性地执行内容驱动的视听操作，以改变整个视频的情感极性。我们对所提出的数据集进行基准测试的基准方法是 3DCNN 模型，称为边界感知时间伪造检测 (BA-TFD)，它通过对比、边界匹配和帧分类损失函数进行引导。我们广泛的定量和定性分析证明了所提出的方法在时间伪造定位和深度伪造检测任务方面的强大性能。 本文提出一个内容驱动的音频-视觉深度伪造数据集LAV-DF及多模态方法BA-TFD，用于时间伪造定位任务。 Zhixi Cai,Kalin Stefanov,Abhinav Dhall,Munawar Hayat cs.CV

title: Research on Intellectual Property Resource Profile and Evolution Law
title_zh: 知识产权资源概况及演化规律研究
abstract: In the era of big data, intellectual property-oriented scientific and technological resources show the trend of large data scale, high information density and low value density, which brings severe challenges to the effective use of intellectual property resources, and the demand for mining hidden information in intellectual property is increasing. This makes intellectual property-oriented science and technology resource portraits and analysis of evolution become the current research hotspot. This paper sorts out the construction method of intellectual property resource intellectual portrait and its pre-work property entity extraction and entity completion from the aspects of algorithm classification and general process, and directions for improvement of future methods.
summary: In the era of big data, intellectual property-oriented scientific and technological resources show the trend of large data scale, high information density and low value density, which brings severe challenges to the effective use of intellectual property resources, and the demand for mining hidden information in intellectual property is increasing. This makes intellectual property-oriented science and technology resource portraits and analysis of evolution become the current research hotspot. This paper sorts out the construction method of intellectual property resource intellectual portrait and its pre-work property entity extraction and entity completion from the aspects of algorithm classification and general process, and directions for improvement of future methods.
abstract_zh: 大数据时代，以知识产权为导向的科技资源呈现出数据规模大、信息密度高、价值密度低的趋势，这给知识产权资源的有效利用带来严峻挑战，挖掘知识产权中隐藏信息的需求日益增加。这使得以知识产权为导向的科技资源画像与演化分析成为当前的研究热点。本文从算法分类和一般流程等方面梳理了知识产权资源知识产权画像的构建方法及其前置工作产权实体提取和实体补全，以及未来方法的改进方向。

AI.tldr: 研究大数据时代下知识产权资源画像的构建方法及其演变规律，应对资源利用挑战。
AI.motivation: 大数据时代下知识产权资源呈现大规模、高信息密度与低价值密度特征，亟需挖掘隐藏信息以提升利用效率，推动画像与演变分析研究成为热点。
AI.method: 系统梳理知识产权资源画像构建流程，涵盖实体提取、实体补全技术，并分类阐述算法实现与优化方向。
AI.result: 明确了画像构建的技术路径与关键步骤，提出未来方法改进方向，为后续研究提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法在实体识别与关联分析上存在局限，需结合多源数据与智能算法推动知识产权资源深度挖掘与应用。

title: A Novel Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search for Manipulator Calibration
title_zh: 用于机械手校准的新型二次插值甲虫天线搜索
abstract: Over the past decades, industrial manipulators play a vital role in in various fields, like aircraft manufacturing and automobile manufacturing. However, an industrial manipulator without calibration suffers from its low absolute positioning accuracy, which extensively restricts its application in high-precision intelligent manufacture. Recent manipulator calibration methods are developed to address this issue, while they frequently encounter long-tail convergence and low calibration accuracy. To address this thorny issue, this work proposes a novel manipulator calibration method incorporating an extended Kalman filter with a Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm. This paper has three-fold ideas: a) proposing a new Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm to deal with the issue of local optimum and low convergence rate in a Beetle Antennae Search algorithm; b) adopting an extended Kalman filter algorithm to suppress non-Gaussian noises and c) developing a new manipulator calibration method incorporating an extended Kalman filter with a Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm to calibrating a manipulator. Extensively experimental results on an ABB IRB120 industrial manipulator demonstrate that the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than several state-of-the-art calibration methods.
summary: Over the past decades, industrial manipulators play a vital role in in various fields, like aircraft manufacturing and automobile manufacturing. However, an industrial manipulator without calibration suffers from its low absolute positioning accuracy, which extensively restricts its application in high-precision intelligent manufacture. Recent manipulator calibration methods are developed to address this issue, while they frequently encounter long-tail convergence and low calibration accuracy. To address this thorny issue, this work proposes a novel manipulator calibration method incorporating an extended Kalman filter with a Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm. This paper has three-fold ideas: a) proposing a new Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm to deal with the issue of local optimum and low convergence rate in a Beetle Antennae Search algorithm; b) adopting an extended Kalman filter algorithm to suppress non-Gaussian noises and c) developing a new manipulator calibration method incorporating an extended Kalman filter with a Quadratic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search algorithm to calibrating a manipulator. Extensively experimental results on an ABB IRB120 industrial manipulator demonstrate that the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than several state-of-the-art calibration methods.
abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，工业机械手在飞机制造、汽车制造等各个领域发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，未经标定的工业机械手绝对定位精度较低，严重限制了其在高精度智能制造中的应用。最近开发的机械臂校准方法是为了解决这个问题，但它们经常遇到长尾收敛和校准精度低的问题。为了解决这个棘手的问题，这项工作提出了一种新颖的机械臂校准方法，结合了扩展卡尔曼滤波器和二次插值甲虫天线搜索算法。本文有三个想法：a）提出一种新的二次插值甲虫天线搜索算法，以解决甲虫天线搜索算法局部最优和收敛速度慢的问题； b) 采用扩展卡尔曼滤波器算法来抑制非高斯噪声，以及 c) 开发一种新的机械臂校准方法，将扩展卡尔曼滤波器与二次插值甲虫天线搜索算法相结合来校准机械臂。 ABB IRB120 工业机械手上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法比几种最先进的校准方法具有更高的校准精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合二次插值甲虫触角搜索算法与扩展卡尔曼滤波器的新方法，用于提高工业机械臂的标定精度。
AI.motivation: 工业机械臂未标定时绝对定位精度低，现有标定方法存在收敛速度慢、精度不足等问题，限制了其在高精度智能制造中的应用。
AI.method: 提出二次插值甲虫触角搜索算法解决局部最优和收敛速度问题，并结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器抑制非高斯噪声，开发新型机械臂标定方法。
AI.result: 在ABB IRB120机械臂上的实验表明，该方法标定精度显著优于现有先进标定方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了机械臂标定精度，为高精度智能制造提供了可行解决方案。

title: An Advancing Ensemble with Diversified Algorithms for Robot Arm Calibration
title_zh: 具有多样化算法的先进集成机器人手臂校准
abstract: Recently, industrial robots plays a significant role in intelligent manufacturing. Hence, it is an urgent issue to ensure the robot with the high positioning precision. To address this hot issue, a novel calibration method based on an powerful ensemble with various algorithms is proposed. This paper has two ideas: a) developing eight calibration methods to identify the kinematic parameter errors; 2) establishing an effective ensemble to search calibrated kinematic parameters. Enough experimental results show that this ensemble can achieve: 1) higher calibration accuracy for the robot; 2) model diversity; 3) strong generalization ability.
summary: Recently, industrial robots plays a significant role in intelligent manufacturing. Hence, it is an urgent issue to ensure the robot with the high positioning precision. To address this hot issue, a novel calibration method based on an powerful ensemble with various algorithms is proposed. This paper has two ideas: a) developing eight calibration methods to identify the kinematic parameter errors; 2) establishing an effective ensemble to search calibrated kinematic parameters. Enough experimental results show that this ensemble can achieve: 1) higher calibration accuracy for the robot; 2) model diversity; 3) strong generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 近年来，工业机器人在智能制造中发挥着重要作用。因此，保证机器人的高定位精度是一个迫切需要解决的问题。为了解决这个热点问题，提出了一种基于具有各种算法的强大集成的新颖校准方法。本文有两个想法：a）开发八种标定方法来识别运动学参数误差； 2）建立有效的集合来搜索校准的运动学参数。足够的实验结果表明，该集成体可以实现：1）机器人标定精度更高； 2）模型多样性； 3）泛化能力强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多样化算法集成的机器人臂标定方法，以提高工业机器人的定位精度。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人在智能制造中至关重要，但其定位精度不足成为亟待解决的问题，传统单一算法难以满足高精度需求。
AI.method: 开发八种标定方法识别运动学参数误差，并构建集成框架融合多算法搜索最优标定参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该集成方法实现更高标定精度、模型多样性及强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多样化集成算法有效提升了机器人臂标定性能，为高精度工业应用提供新思路。

search_text: An Advancing Ensemble with Diversified Algorithms for Robot Arm Calibration 具有多样化算法的先进集成机器人手臂校准 Recently, industrial robots plays a significant role in intelligent manufacturing. Hence, it is an urgent issue to ensure the robot with the high positioning precision. To address this hot issue, a novel calibration method based on an powerful ensemble with various algorithms is proposed. This paper has two ideas: a) developing eight calibration methods to identify the kinematic parameter errors; 2) establishing an effective ensemble to search calibrated kinematic parameters. title: Sapinet: A sparse event-based spatiotemporal oscillator for learning in the wild
title_zh: Sapinet：一种用于野外学习的基于稀疏事件的时空振荡器
abstract: We introduce Sapinet -- a spike timing (event)-based multilayer neural network for \textit{learning in the wild} -- that is: one-shot online learning of multiple inputs without catastrophic forgetting, and without the need for data-specific hyperparameter retuning. Key features of Sapinet include data regularization, model scaling, data classification, and denoising. The model also supports stimulus similarity mapping. We propose a systematic method to tune the network for performance. We studied the model performance on different levels of odor similarity, gaussian and impulse noise. Sapinet achieved high classification accuracies on standard machine olfaction datasets without the requirement of fine tuning for a specific dataset.
summary: We introduce Sapinet -- a spike timing (event)-based multilayer neural network for \textit{learning in the wild} -- that is: one-shot online learning of multiple inputs without catastrophic forgetting, and without the need for data-specific hyperparameter retuning. Key features of Sapinet include data regularization, model scaling, data classification, and denoising. The model also supports stimulus similarity mapping. We propose a systematic method to tune the network for performance. We studied the model performance on different levels of odor similarity, gaussian and impulse noise. Sapinet achieved high classification accuracies on standard machine olfaction datasets without the requirement of fine tuning for a specific dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 Sapinet——一种基于尖峰定时（事件）的多层神经网络，用于\textit{野外学习}——即：一次性在线学习多个输入，不会发生灾难性遗忘，并且不需要特定于数据的超参数重新调整。 Sapinet 的主要功能包括数据正则化、模型缩放、数据分类和去噪。该模型还支持刺激相似性映射。我们提出了一种系统方法来调整网络性能。我们研究了模型在不同级别的气味相似性、高斯和脉冲噪声上的性能。 Sapinet 在标准机器嗅觉数据集上实现了高分类精度，无需针对特定数据集进行微调。

AI.tldr: 提出Sapinet，一种基于事件驱动的神经网络，实现在无需灾难性遗忘和超参数调整的情况下进行多输入在线学习。
AI.motivation: 解决传统神经网络在在线学习中面临的灾难性遗忘问题及对数据特定超参数的依赖，实现真实环境下的高效学习。
AI.method: 设计稀疏事件驱动的时空振荡器结构，结合数据正则化、模型扩展、刺激相似性映射及系统化调参方法。
AI.result: 在标准机器嗅觉数据集上实现高分类准确率，无需特定数据集微调，且在噪声环境下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: Sapinet有效支持真实场景下的在线学习，为机器嗅觉等应用提供无需人工干预的鲁棒解决方案。

title: Context-based Deep Learning Architecture with Optimal Integration Layer for Image Parsing
title_zh: 用于图像解析的具有最佳集成层的基于上下文的深度学习架构
abstract: Deep learning models have been efficient lately on image parsing tasks. However, deep learning models are not fully capable of exploiting visual and contextual information simultaneously. The proposed three-layer context-based deep architecture is capable of integrating context explicitly with visual information. The novel idea here is to have a visual layer to learn visual characteristics from binary class-based learners, a contextual layer to learn context, and then an integration layer to learn from both via genetic algorithm-based optimal fusion to produce a final decision. The experimental outcomes when evaluated on benchmark datasets are promising. Further analysis shows that optimized network weights can improve performance and make stable predictions.
summary: Deep learning models have been efficient lately on image parsing tasks. However, deep learning models are not fully capable of exploiting visual and contextual information simultaneously. The proposed three-layer context-based deep architecture is capable of integrating context explicitly with visual information. The novel idea here is to have a visual layer to learn visual characteristics from binary class-based learners, a contextual layer to learn context, and then an integration layer to learn from both via genetic algorithm-based optimal fusion to produce a final decision. The experimental outcomes when evaluated on benchmark datasets are promising. Further analysis shows that optimized network weights can improve performance and make stable predictions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型最近在图像解析任务上非常高效。然而，深度学习模型并不完全能够同时利用视觉和上下文信息。所提出的三层基于上下文的深层架构能够将上下文与视觉信息显式集成。这里的新颖想法是拥有一个视觉层来从基于二元类的学习器学习视觉特征，一个上下文层来学习上下文，然后一个集成层通过基于遗传算法的最优融合来学习两者以产生最终决策。在基准数据集上评估的实验结果是有希望的。进一步分析表明，优化的网络权重可以提高性能并做出稳定的预测。

AI.tldr: 提出一种三层深度学习架构，通过显式整合视觉信息与上下文信息提升图像解析性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型难以同时有效利用视觉特征与上下文信息，导致图像解析任务存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计包含视觉层（学习二元分类视觉特征）、上下文层（学习场景语义）和融合层（基于遗传算法的最优权重融合）的三层架构。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，优化后的网络权重使模型预测稳定性与准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过显式上下文建模与优化融合机制，为图像解析任务提供了更全面的信息利用框架。

authors_text: Jiakai Wang,Zixin Yin,Pengfei Hu,Aishan Liu,Renshuai Tao,Haotong Qin,Xianglong Liu,Dacheng Tao
title: Defensive Patches for Robust Recognition in the Physical World
title_zh: 用于物理世界中强大识别的防御补丁
abstract: To operate in real-world high-stakes environments, deep learning systems have to endure noises that have been continuously thwarting their robustness. Data-end defense, which improves robustness by operations on input data instead of modifying models, has attracted intensive attention due to its feasibility in practice. However, previous data-end defenses show low generalization against diverse noises and weak transferability across multiple models. Motivated by the fact that robust recognition depends on both local and global features, we propose a defensive patch generation framework to address these problems by helping models better exploit these features. For the generalization against diverse noises, we inject class-specific identifiable patterns into a confined local patch prior, so that defensive patches could preserve more recognizable features towards specific classes, leading models for better recognition under noises. For the transferability across multiple models, we guide the defensive patches to capture more global feature correlations within a class, so that they could activate model-shared global perceptions and transfer better among models. Our defensive patches show great potentials to improve application robustness in practice by simply sticking them around target objects. Extensive experiments show that we outperform others by large margins (improve 20+\% accuracy for both adversarial and corruption robustness on average in the digital and physical world). Our codes are available at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/DefensivePatch
summary: To operate in real-world high-stakes environments, deep learning systems have to endure noises that have been continuously thwarting their robustness. Data-end defense, which improves robustness by operations on input data instead of modifying models, has attracted intensive attention due to its feasibility in practice. However, previous data-end defenses show low generalization against diverse noises and weak transferability across multiple models. Motivated by the fact that robust recognition depends on both local and global features, we propose a defensive patch generation framework to address these problems by helping models better exploit these features. For the generalization against diverse noises, we inject class-specific identifiable patterns into a confined local patch prior, so that defensive patches could preserve more recognizable features towards specific classes, leading models for better recognition under noises. For the transferability across multiple models, we guide the defensive patches to capture more global feature correlations within a class, so that they could activate model-shared global perceptions and transfer better among models. Our defensive patches show great potentials to improve application robustness in practice by simply sticking them around target objects. Extensive experiments show that we outperform others by large margins (improve 20+\% accuracy for both adversarial and corruption robustness on average in the digital and physical world). Our codes are available at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/DefensivePatch
abstract_zh: 为了在现实世界的高风险环境中运行，深度学习系统必须承受不断阻碍其鲁棒性的噪音。数据端防御通过对输入数据进行操作而不是修改模型来提高鲁棒性，因其在实践中的可行性而受到广泛关注。然而，以前的数据端防御显示出针对不同噪声的通用性较低，并且跨多个模型的可移植性较弱。由于鲁棒识别取决于局部和全局特征，我们提出了一种防御性补丁生成框架，通过帮助模型更好地利用这些特征来解决这些问题。为了对不同噪声进行泛化，我们将特定于类别的可识别模式注入到受限的局部补丁中，以便防御补丁可以保留针对特定类别的更多可识别特征，从而使模型在噪声下更好地识别。对于跨多个模型的可迁移性，我们引导防御补丁捕获类内更多的全局特征相关性，以便它们可以激活模型共享的全局感知并在模型之间更好地迁移。我们的防御补丁显示出巨大的潜力，只需将它们粘贴在目标对象周围即可在实践中提高应用程序的稳健性。大量实验表明，我们大幅优于其他人（在数字和物理世界中，对抗性和腐败鲁棒性的准确度平均提高了 20% 以上）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/DefectivePatch 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成防御性补丁的框架，以提升深度学习系统在物理世界中对噪声和对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有数据端防御方法在应对多样化噪声和跨模型迁移时表现不足，需通过结合局部与全局特征提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 注入类特定可识别模式至局部补丁以保留可辨识特征，并引导补丁捕捉类内全局特征关联以激活共享感知机制。
AI.result: 在数字和物理世界中，对抗与腐蚀鲁棒性平均提升20%以上，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 防御性补丁通过简单粘贴即可显著提升实际应用中的识别鲁棒性，为现实场景提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Defensive Patches for Robust Recognition in the Physical World 用于物理世界中强大识别的防御补丁 To operate in real-world high-stakes environments, deep learning systems have to endure noises that have been continuously thwarting their robustness. Data-end defense, which improves robustness by operations on input data instead of modifying models, has attracted intensive attention due to its feasibility in practice. However, previous data-end defenses show low generalization against diverse noises and weak transferability across multiple models. Motivated by the fact that robust recognition depends on both local and global features, we propose a defensive patch generation framework to address these problems by helping models better exploit these features. For the generalization against diverse noises, we inject class-specific identifiable patterns into a confined local patch prior, so that defensive patches could preserve more recognizable features towards specific classes, leading models for better recognition under noises. For the transferability across multiple models, we guide the defensive patches to capture more global feature correlations within a class, so that they could activate model-shared global perceptions and transfer better among models. Our defensive patches show great potentials to improve application robustness in practice by simply sticking them around target objects. Extensive experiments show that we outperform others by large margins (improve 20+\% accuracy for both adversarial and corruption robustness on average in the digital and physical world). Our codes are available at https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/DefensivePatch 为了在现实世界的高风险环境中运行，深度学习系统必须承受不断阻碍其鲁棒性的噪音。数据端防御通过对输入数据进行操作而不是修改模型来提高鲁棒性，因其在实践中的可行性而受到广泛关注。然而，以前的数据端防御显示出针对不同噪声的通用性较低，并且跨多个模型的可移植性较弱。由于鲁棒识别取决于局部和全局特征，我们提出了一种防御性补丁生成框架，通过帮助模型更好地利用这些特征来解决这些问题。为了对不同噪声进行泛化，我们将特定于类别的可识别模式注入到受限的局部补丁中，以便防御补丁可以保留针对特定类别的更多可识别特征，从而使模型在噪声下更好地识别。对于跨多个模型的可迁移性，我们引导防御补丁捕获类内更多的全局特征相关性，以便它们可以激活模型共享的全局感知并在模型之间更好地迁移。我们的防御补丁显示出巨大的潜力，只需将它们粘贴在目标对象周围即可在实践中提高应用程序的稳健性。大量实验表明，我们大幅优于其他人（在数字和物理世界中，对抗性和腐败鲁棒性的准确度平均提高了 20% 以上）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nlsde-safety-team/DefectivePatch 获取 本文提出一种生成防御性补丁的框架，以提升深度学习系统在物理世界中对噪声和对抗样本的鲁棒性。 Jiakai Wang,Zixin Yin,Pengfei Hu,Aishan Liu,Renshuai Tao,Haotong Qin,Xianglong Liu,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

title: A New Robot Arm Calibration Method Based on Cubic Interpolated Beetle Antennae Search Approach
title_zh: 一种基于三次插值甲虫天线搜索方法的新型机械臂标定方法
abstract: Industrial robot arms are extensively important for intelligent manufacturing. An industrial robot arm commonly enjoys its high repetitive positioning accuracy while suffering from its low absolute positioning accuracy, which greatly restricts its application in high-precision manufacture, like automobile manufacture. Aiming at addressing this hot issue, this work proposes a novel robot arm calibration method based on cubic interpolated beetle antennae search (CIBAS). This study has three ideas: a) developing a novel CIBAS algorithm, which can effectively addresses the issue of local optimum in a Beetle Antennae Search algorithm; b) utilizing a particle filter to reduce the influence of non-Gaussian noises; and c) proposing a new calibration method incorporating CIBAS algorithm and particle filter to searching the optimal kinematic parameters. Experimental results on an ABB IRB120 industrial robot arm demonstrate that the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than several state-of-the-art calibration methods.
summary: Industrial robot arms are extensively important for intelligent manufacturing. An industrial robot arm commonly enjoys its high repetitive positioning accuracy while suffering from its low absolute positioning accuracy, which greatly restricts its application in high-precision manufacture, like automobile manufacture. Aiming at addressing this hot issue, this work proposes a novel robot arm calibration method based on cubic interpolated beetle antennae search (CIBAS). This study has three ideas: a) developing a novel CIBAS algorithm, which can effectively addresses the issue of local optimum in a Beetle Antennae Search algorithm; b) utilizing a particle filter to reduce the influence of non-Gaussian noises; and c) proposing a new calibration method incorporating CIBAS algorithm and particle filter to searching the optimal kinematic parameters. Experimental results on an ABB IRB120 industrial robot arm demonstrate that the proposed method achieves much higher calibration accuracy than several state-of-the-art calibration methods.
abstract_zh: 工业机器人手臂对于智能制造非常重要。工业机器人手臂普遍具有较高的重复定位精度，但其绝对定位精度较低，这极大地限制了其在汽车制造等高精度制造领域的应用。针对这一热点问题，本文提出了一种基于三次插值甲虫天线搜索（CIBAS）的机器人臂标定方法。本研究有三个想法：a）开发一种新颖的CIBAS算法，可以有效解决Beetle天线搜索算法中的局部最优问题； b) 利用粒子滤波器减少非高斯噪声的影响； c)提出一种结合CIBAS算法和粒子滤波器的新标定方法来搜索最佳运动学参数。 ABB IRB120 工业机器人手臂上的实验结果表明，所提出的方法比几种最先进的校准方法具有更高的校准精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于三次插值甲虫触角搜索算法（CIBAS）的新型工业机器人臂标定方法，以提高绝对定位精度。
AI.motivation: 工业机器人臂虽具有高重复定位精度，但绝对定位精度不足，限制了其在汽车制造等高精度领域的应用，亟需改进标定方法。
AI.method: 开发改进的CIBAS算法以解决局部最优问题，结合粒子滤波器降低非高斯噪声影响，并将两者整合为新的标定方法以优化运动学参数。
AI.result: 在ABB IRB120机器人上的实验表明，该方法的标定精度显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了机器人臂的标定精度，为高精度制造场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Gorka Velez,Edoardo Bonetto,Daniele Brevi,Angel Martin,Gianluca Rizzi,Oscar Castañeda,Arslane Hamza Cherif,Marcos Nieto,Oihana Otaegui
title: 5G Features and Standards for Vehicle Data Exploitation
title_zh: 车辆数据开发的 5G 特性和标准
comment: 12 pages. To be published in ITS European Congress 2022
comments: 12 pages. To be published in ITS European Congress 2022
abstract: Cars capture and generate huge volumes of data in real-time about the driving dynamics, the environment, and the driver and passengers' activities. Due to the proliferation of cooperative, connected and automated mobility (CCAM), the value of data from vehicles is getting strategic, not just for the automotive industry, but also for many diverse stakeholders including small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and start-ups. 5G can enable car-captured data to feed innovative applications and services deployed in the cloud ensuring lower latency and higher throughput than previous cellular technologies. This paper identifies and discusses the relevance of the main 5G features that can contribute to a scalable, flexible, reliable and secure data pipeline, pointing to the standards and technical reports that specify their implementation.
summary: Cars capture and generate huge volumes of data in real-time about the driving dynamics, the environment, and the driver and passengers' activities. Due to the proliferation of cooperative, connected and automated mobility (CCAM), the value of data from vehicles is getting strategic, not just for the automotive industry, but also for many diverse stakeholders including small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and start-ups. 5G can enable car-captured data to feed innovative applications and services deployed in the cloud ensuring lower latency and higher throughput than previous cellular technologies. This paper identifies and discusses the relevance of the main 5G features that can contribute to a scalable, flexible, reliable and secure data pipeline, pointing to the standards and technical reports that specify their implementation.
abstract_zh: 汽车实时捕获并生成大量有关驾驶动态、环境以及驾驶员和乘客活动的数据。由于协作、互联和自动化移动 (CCAM) 的普及，车辆数据的价值变得越来越具有战略意义，不仅对汽车行业而言，而且对包括中小型企业 (SME) 和初创企业在内的许多不同利益相关者而言也是如此。 5G 可以使汽车捕获的数据为部署在云中的创新应用程序和服务提供支持，确保比以前的蜂窝技术更低的延迟和更高的吞吐量。本文确定并讨论了可有助于可扩展、灵活、可靠和安全的数据管道的主要 5G 功能的相关性，并指出了指定其实施的标准和技术报告。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别和讨论5G关键特性及其标准，以支持车辆数据的高效利用，构建可扩展、灵活、可靠且安全的数据管道。
AI.motivation: 随着协同、连接和自动驾驶（CCAM）的发展，车辆生成的实时数据对汽车行业及其他利益相关者（如中小企业）具有战略价值，亟需5G技术实现低延迟、高吞吐量的数据传输。
AI.method: 通过分析现有5G标准和技术报告，识别适用于车辆数据管道的核心5G特性，并探讨其技术实现规范。
AI.result: 明确了5G的低延迟、高带宽、网络切片等特性对车辆数据管道的重要性，并指出了相关国际标准（如3GPP）的具体技术实现。
AI.conclusion: 5G技术及其标准为车辆数据的云端应用提供了关键支撑，未来需进一步推动标准化以实现CCAM生态系统的数据价值最大化。

motivation: 随着协同、连接和自动驾驶（CCAM）的发展，车辆生成的实时数据对汽车行业及其他利益相关者（如中小企业）具有战略价值，亟需5G技术实现低延迟、高吞吐量的数据传输。
method: 通过分析现有5G标准和技术报告，识别适用于车辆数据管道的核心5G特性，并探讨其技术实现规范。
result: 明确了5G的低延迟、高带宽、网络切片等特性对车辆数据管道的重要性，并指出了相关国际标准（如3GPP）的具体技术实现。
conclusion: 5G技术及其标准为车辆数据的云端应用提供了关键支撑，未来需进一步推动标准化以实现CCAM生态系统的数据价值最大化。
search_text: 5G Features and Standards for Vehicle Data Exploitation 车辆数据开发的 5G 特性和标准 Cars capture and generate huge volumes of data in real-time about the driving dynamics, the environment, and the driver and passengers' activities. Due to the proliferation of cooperative, connected and automated mobility (CCAM), the value of data from vehicles is getting strategic, not just for the automotive industry, but also for many diverse stakeholders including small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) and start-ups. 5G can enable car-captured data to feed innovative applications and services deployed in the cloud ensuring lower latency and higher throughput than previous cellular technologies. This paper identifies and discusses the relevance of the main 5G features that can contribute to a scalable, flexible, reliable and secure data pipeline, pointing to the standards and technical reports that specify their implementation. 汽车实时捕获并生成大量有关驾驶动态、环境以及驾驶员和乘客活动的数据。由于协作、互联和自动化移动 (CCAM) 的普及，车辆数据的价值变得越来越具有战略意义，不仅对汽车行业而言，而且对包括中小型企业 (SME) 和初创企业在内的许多不同利益相关者而言也是如此。 5G 可以使汽车捕获的数据为部署在云中的创新应用程序和服务提供支持，确保比以前的蜂窝技术更低的延迟和更高的吞吐量。本文确定并讨论了可有助于可扩展、灵活、可靠和安全的数据管道的主要 5G 功能的相关性，并指出了指定其实施的标准和技术报告。 本文旨在识别和讨论5G关键特性及其标准，以支持车辆数据的高效利用，构建可扩展、灵活、可靠且安全的数据管道。 Gorka Velez,Edoardo Bonetto,Daniele Brevi,Angel Martin,Gianluca Rizzi,Oscar Castañeda,Arslane Hamza Cherif,Marcos Nieto,Oihana Otaegui cs.CV,cs.NI

title: First-Order Bilevel Topology Optimization for Fast Mechanical Design
title_zh: 用于快速机械设计的一阶双层拓扑优化
abstract: Topology Optimization (TO), which maximizes structural robustness under material weight constraints, is becoming an essential step for the automatic design of mechanical parts. However, existing TO algorithms use the Finite Element Analysis (FEA) that requires massive computational resources. We present a novel TO algorithm that incurs a much lower iterative cost. Unlike conventional methods that require exact inversions of large FEA system matrices at every iteration, we reformulate the problem as a bilevel optimization that can be solved using a first-order algorithm and only inverts the system matrix approximately. As a result, our method incurs a low iterative cost, and users can preview the TO results interactively for fast design updates. Theoretical convergence analysis and numerical experiments are conducted to verify our effectiveness. We further discuss extensions to use high-performance preconditioners and fine-grained parallelism on the Graphics Processing Unit (GPU).
summary: Topology Optimization (TO), which maximizes structural robustness under material weight constraints, is becoming an essential step for the automatic design of mechanical parts. However, existing TO algorithms use the Finite Element Analysis (FEA) that requires massive computational resources. We present a novel TO algorithm that incurs a much lower iterative cost. Unlike conventional methods that require exact inversions of large FEA system matrices at every iteration, we reformulate the problem as a bilevel optimization that can be solved using a first-order algorithm and only inverts the system matrix approximately. As a result, our method incurs a low iterative cost, and users can preview the TO results interactively for fast design updates. Theoretical convergence analysis and numerical experiments are conducted to verify our effectiveness. We further discuss extensions to use high-performance preconditioners and fine-grained parallelism on the Graphics Processing Unit (GPU).
abstract_zh: 拓扑优化 (TO) 可在材料重量限制下最大限度地提高结构鲁棒性，正在成为机械零件自动设计的重要步骤。然而，现有的 TO 算法使用需要大量计算资源的有限元分析 (FEA)。我们提出了一种新颖的 TO 算法，其迭代成本要低得多。与每次迭代时都需要对大型 FEA 系统矩阵进行精确求逆的传统方法不同，我们将问题重新表述为双层优化，可以使用一阶算法求解，并且仅对系统矩阵进行近似求逆。因此，我们的方法迭代成本较低，用户可以交互式预览 TO 结果以实现快速设计更新。进行理论收敛分析和数值实验来验证我们的有效性。我们进一步讨论在图形处理单元 (GPU) 上使用高性能预处理器和细粒度并行性的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种低迭代成本的拓扑优化算法，用于加速机械部件的自动设计。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑优化算法依赖高计算成本的有限元分析，难以满足快速设计迭代需求。
AI.method: 将问题重构为可使用一阶算法求解的双层优化问题，仅进行系统矩阵的近似求逆。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证了方法有效性，并扩展支持GPU高性能预处理和并行计算。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著降低迭代成本，支持交互式拓扑优化结果预览，提升机械设计效率。

title: Deep Learning Model with GA based Feature Selection and Context Integration
title_zh: 具有基于 GA 的特征选择和上下文集成的深度学习模型
comment: ef:in 2021 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2021, pp. 288-295
comments: ef:in 2021 IEEE Congress on Evolutionary Computation (CEC) 2021, pp. 288-295
abstract: Deep learning models have been very successful in computer vision and image processing applications. Since its inception, Many top-performing methods for image segmentation are based on deep CNN models. However, deep CNN models fail to integrate global and local context alongside visual features despite having complex multi-layer architectures. We propose a novel three-layered deep learning model that assiminlate or learns independently global and local contextual information alongside visual features. The novelty of the proposed model is that One-vs-All binary class-based learners are introduced to learn Genetic Algorithm (GA) optimized features in the visual layer, followed by the contextual layer that learns global and local contexts of an image, and finally the third layer integrates all the information optimally to obtain the final class label. Stanford Background and CamVid benchmark image parsing datasets were used for our model evaluation, and our model shows promising results. The empirical analysis reveals that optimized visual features with global and local contextual information play a significant role to improve accuracy and produce stable predictions comparable to state-of-the-art deep CNN models.
summary: Deep learning models have been very successful in computer vision and image processing applications. Since its inception, Many top-performing methods for image segmentation are based on deep CNN models. However, deep CNN models fail to integrate global and local context alongside visual features despite having complex multi-layer architectures. We propose a novel three-layered deep learning model that assiminlate or learns independently global and local contextual information alongside visual features. The novelty of the proposed model is that One-vs-All binary class-based learners are introduced to learn Genetic Algorithm (GA) optimized features in the visual layer, followed by the contextual layer that learns global and local contexts of an image, and finally the third layer integrates all the information optimally to obtain the final class label. Stanford Background and CamVid benchmark image parsing datasets were used for our model evaluation, and our model shows promising results. The empirical analysis reveals that optimized visual features with global and local contextual information play a significant role to improve accuracy and produce stable predictions comparable to state-of-the-art deep CNN models.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在计算机视觉和图像处理应用中非常成功。自诞生以来，许多性能最佳的图像分割方法都是基于深度 CNN 模型。然而，尽管深度 CNN 模型具有复杂的多层架构，但仍无法将全局和局部上下文与视觉特征结合起来。我们提出了一种新颖的三层深度学习模型，可以吸收或独立学习全局和局部上下文信息以及视觉特征。该模型的新颖之处在于，引入一对一的二元基于类的学习器来学习视觉层中遗传算法（GA）优化的特征，然后是学习图像的全局和局部上下文的上下文层，最后第三层最优地整合所有信息以获得最终的类标签。斯坦福背景和 CamVid 基准图像解析数据集用于我们的模型评估，我们的模型显示了有希望的结果。实证分析表明，具有全局和局部上下文信息的优化视觉特征在提高准确性和产生与最先进的深度 CNN 模型相当的稳定预测方面发挥着重要作用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合遗传算法（GA）优化特征选择与上下文整合的三层深度学习模型，用于提升图像分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度CNN模型难以有效整合图像的全局与局部上下文信息，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 设计三层架构：视觉层通过GA优化特征选择，上下文层独立学习全局与局部信息，第三层整合多源信息生成最终分类结果。
AI.result: 在Stanford Background和CamVid数据集上验证，模型准确率与稳定性达到甚至超越当前先进CNN模型水平。
AI.conclusion: 融合GA优化特征与上下文信息的深度学习模型能显著提升图像分割性能，具有实际应用价值。

title: Calibrating Class Weights with Multi-Modal Information for Partial Video Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 使用多模态信息校准类权重以实现部分视频域自适应
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia (ACMMM) 2022, update to camera-ready version. 8 pages of text, 5 figures, 2 tables
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia (ACMMM) 2022, update to camera-ready version. 8 pages of text, 5 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Assuming the source label space subsumes the target one, Partial Video Domain Adaptation (PVDA) is a more general and practical scenario for cross-domain video classification problems. The key challenge of PVDA is to mitigate the negative transfer caused by the source-only outlier classes. To tackle this challenge, a crucial step is to aggregate target predictions to assign class weights by up-weighing target classes and down-weighing outlier classes. However, the incorrect predictions of class weights can mislead the network and lead to negative transfer. Previous works improve the class weight accuracy by utilizing temporal features and attention mechanisms, but these methods may fall short when trying to generate accurate class weight when domain shifts are significant, as in most real-world scenarios. To deal with these challenges, we propose the Multi-modality Cluster-calibrated partial Adversarial Network (MCAN). MCAN enhances video feature extraction with multi-modal features from multiple temporal scales to form more robust overall features. It utilizes a novel class weight calibration method to alleviate the negative transfer caused by incorrect class weights. The calibration method tries to identify and weigh correct and incorrect predictions using distributional information implied by unsupervised clustering. Extensive experiments are conducted on prevailing PVDA benchmarks, and the proposed MCAN achieves significant improvements when compared to state-of-the-art PVDA methods.
summary: Assuming the source label space subsumes the target one, Partial Video Domain Adaptation (PVDA) is a more general and practical scenario for cross-domain video classification problems. The key challenge of PVDA is to mitigate the negative transfer caused by the source-only outlier classes. To tackle this challenge, a crucial step is to aggregate target predictions to assign class weights by up-weighing target classes and down-weighing outlier classes. However, the incorrect predictions of class weights can mislead the network and lead to negative transfer. Previous works improve the class weight accuracy by utilizing temporal features and attention mechanisms, but these methods may fall short when trying to generate accurate class weight when domain shifts are significant, as in most real-world scenarios. To deal with these challenges, we propose the Multi-modality Cluster-calibrated partial Adversarial Network (MCAN). MCAN enhances video feature extraction with multi-modal features from multiple temporal scales to form more robust overall features. It utilizes a novel class weight calibration method to alleviate the negative transfer caused by incorrect class weights. The calibration method tries to identify and weigh correct and incorrect predictions using distributional information implied by unsupervised clustering. Extensive experiments are conducted on prevailing PVDA benchmarks, and the proposed MCAN achieves significant improvements when compared to state-of-the-art PVDA methods.
abstract_zh: 假设源标签空间包含目标标签空间，部分视频域适应（PVDA）是跨域视频分类问题的一种更通用和实用的场景。 PVDA 的主要挑战是减轻仅源异常值类引起的负迁移。为了应对这一挑战，关键的一步是聚合目标预测，通过提高目标类别的权重和降低离群值类别的权重来分配类别权重。然而，类别权重的错误预测可能会误导网络并导致负迁移。以前的工作通过利用时间特征和注意机制来提高类权重的准确性，但是当域转移很大时（就像在大多数现实场景中一样），当尝试生成准确的类权重时，这些方法可能会不足。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了多模态集群校准的部分对抗网络（MCAN）。 MCAN 通过多个时间尺度的多模态特征增强视频特征提取，形成更鲁棒的整体特征。它利用一种新颖的类别权重校准方法来减轻由不正确的类别权重引起的负迁移。校准方法尝试使用无监督聚类隐含的分布信息来识别和权衡正确和错误的预测。在流行的 PVDA 基准上进行了大量的实验，与最先进的 PVDA 方法相比，所提出的 MCAN 取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多模态聚类校准对抗网络（MCAN），通过多模态信息校准类别权重以解决部分视频领域自适应（PVDA）中的负迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理显著领域偏移时，依赖时间特征和注意力机制的类别权重校准效果有限，无法准确识别目标域中的正确类别与源域异常类别。
AI.method: MCAN融合多时间尺度的多模态特征提取模块，结合无监督聚类分析分布信息，提出分布感知的类别权重校准方法，通过区分正确/错误预测缓解负迁移。
AI.result: 在主流PVDA基准测试中，MCAN相比现有SOTA方法取得显著性能提升，验证了多模态特征融合与聚类校准的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态特征增强与分布感知的权重校准，MCAN有效解决了部分领域自适应中因类别权重错误导致的负迁移问题。

search_text: Calibrating Class Weights with Multi-Modal Information for Partial Video Domain Adaptation 使用多模态信息校准类权重以实现部分视频域自适应 Assuming the source label space subsumes the target one, Partial Video Domain Adaptation (PVDA) is a more general and practical scenario for cross-domain video classification problems. The key challenge of PVDA is to mitigate the negative transfer caused by the source-only outlier classes. To tackle this challenge, a crucial step is to aggregate target predictions to assign class weights by up-weighing target classes and down-weighing outlier classes. However, the incorrect predictions of class weights can mislead the network and lead to negative transfer. Previous works improve the class weight accuracy by utilizing temporal features and attention mechanisms, but these methods may fall short when trying to generate accurate class weight when domain shifts are significant, as in most real-world scenarios. To deal with these challenges, we propose the Multi-modality Cluster-calibrated partial Adversarial Network (MCAN). MCAN enhances video feature extraction with multi-modal features from multiple temporal scales to form more robust overall features. It utilizes a novel class weight calibration method to alleviate the negative transfer caused by incorrect class weights. The calibration method tries to identify and weigh correct and incorrect predictions using distributional information implied by unsupervised clustering. Extensive experiments are conducted on prevailing PVDA benchmarks, and the proposed MCAN achieves significant improvements when compared to state-of-the-art PVDA methods. 假设源标签空间包含目标标签空间，部分视频域适应（PVDA）是跨域视频分类问题的一种更通用和实用的场景。 PVDA 的主要挑战是减轻仅源异常值类引起的负迁移。为了应对这一挑战，关键的一步是聚合目标预测，通过提高目标类别的权重和降低离群值类别的权重来分配类别权重。然而，类别权重的错误预测可能会误导网络并导致负迁移。以前的工作通过利用时间特征和注意机制来提高类权重的准确性，但是当域转移很大时（就像在大多数现实场景中一样），当尝试生成准确的类权重时，这些方法可能会不足。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了多模态集群校准的部分对抗网络（MCAN）。 MCAN 通过多个时间尺度的多模态特征增强视频特征提取，形成更鲁棒的整体特征。它利用一种新颖的类别权重校准方法来减轻由不正确的类别权重引起的负迁移。校准方法尝试使用无监督聚类隐含的分布信息来识别和权衡正确和错误的预测。在流行的 PVDA 基准上进行了大量的实验，与最先进的 PVDA 方法相比，所提出的 MCAN 取得了显着的改进。 本文提出多模态聚类校准对抗网络（MCAN），通过多模态信息校准类别权重以解决部分视频领域自适应（PVDA）中的负迁移问题。 Xiyu Wang,Yuecong Xu,Kezhi Mao,Jianfei Yang cs.CV

title: A Universality-Individuality Integration Model for Dialog Act Classification
title_zh: 对话行为分类的普遍性-个体性整合模型
abstract: Dialog Act (DA) reveals the general intent of the speaker utterance in a conversation. Accurately predicting DAs can greatly facilitate the development of dialog agents. Although researchers have done extensive research on dialog act classification, the feature information of classification has not been fully considered. This paper suggests that word cues, part-of-speech cues and statistical cues can complement each other to improve the basis for recognition. In addition, the different types of the three lead to the diversity of their distribution forms, which hinders the mining of feature information. To solve this problem, we propose a novel model based on universality and individuality strategies, called Universality-Individuality Integration Model (UIIM). UIIM not only deepens the connection between the clues by learning universality, but also utilizes the learning of individuality to capture the characteristics of the clues themselves. Experiments were made over two most popular benchmark data sets SwDA and MRDA for dialogue act classification, and the results show that extracting the universalities and individualities between cues can more fully excavate the hidden information in the utterance, and improve the accuracy of automatic dialogue act recognition.
summary: Dialog Act (DA) reveals the general intent of the speaker utterance in a conversation. Accurately predicting DAs can greatly facilitate the development of dialog agents. Although researchers have done extensive research on dialog act classification, the feature information of classification has not been fully considered. This paper suggests that word cues, part-of-speech cues and statistical cues can complement each other to improve the basis for recognition. In addition, the different types of the three lead to the diversity of their distribution forms, which hinders the mining of feature information. To solve this problem, we propose a novel model based on universality and individuality strategies, called Universality-Individuality Integration Model (UIIM). UIIM not only deepens the connection between the clues by learning universality, but also utilizes the learning of individuality to capture the characteristics of the clues themselves. Experiments were made over two most popular benchmark data sets SwDA and MRDA for dialogue act classification, and the results show that extracting the universalities and individualities between cues can more fully excavate the hidden information in the utterance, and improve the accuracy of automatic dialogue act recognition.
abstract_zh: 对话行为（DA）揭示了对话中说话者话语的一般意图。准确预测 DA 可以极大地促进对话代理的开发。尽管研究者对对话行为分类进行了广泛的研究，但分类的特征信息尚未得到充分考虑。本文提出，单词线索、词性线索和统计线索可以相互补充，以改善识别的基础。另外，三者的类型不同导致其分布形式的多样性，阻碍了特征信息的挖掘。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于普遍性和个体性策略的新模型，称为普遍性-个体性集成模型（UIIM）。 UIIM不仅通过学习普遍性来加深线索之间的联系，还利用个体性的学习来捕捉线索本身的特征。在两个最流行的对话行为分类基准数据集SwDA和MRDA上进行了实验，结果表明，提取线索之间的共性和个性可以更充分地挖掘话语中隐藏的信息，提高自动对话行为识别的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合普遍性与个体性的对话行为分类模型（UIIM），旨在通过整合词、词性及统计特征提升对话行为识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有对话行为分类方法未充分挖掘词、词性及统计特征之间的互补性，且特征分布多样性阻碍了信息挖掘，需通过统一框架整合多源信息。
AI.method: 设计UIIM模型，通过普遍性学习强化特征间关联，利用个体性学习捕捉特征自身特性，实现多维度特征的协同优化。
AI.result: 在SwDA和MRDA数据集上实验表明，UIIM通过提取特征的普遍性与个体性，显著提升了对话行为自动识别的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 融合普遍性与个体性策略可更全面挖掘语句隐含信息，为对话行为分类提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Marko Mihajlovic,Shunsuke Saito,Aayush Bansal,Michael Zollhoefer,Siyu Tang
title: COAP: Compositional Articulated Occupancy of People
title_zh: COAP：人员组成铰接占用
comment: To appear at CVPR 2022. The project page is available at https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html
comments: To appear at CVPR 2022. The project page is available at https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html
abstract: We present a novel neural implicit representation for articulated human bodies. Compared to explicit template meshes, neural implicit body representations provide an efficient mechanism for modeling interactions with the environment, which is essential for human motion reconstruction and synthesis in 3D scenes. However, existing neural implicit bodies suffer from either poor generalization on highly articulated poses or slow inference time. In this work, we observe that prior knowledge about the human body's shape and kinematic structure can be leveraged to improve generalization and efficiency. We decompose the full-body geometry into local body parts and employ a part-aware encoder-decoder architecture to learn neural articulated occupancy that models complex deformations locally. Our local shape encoder represents the body deformation of not only the corresponding body part but also the neighboring body parts. The decoder incorporates the geometric constraints of local body shape which significantly improves pose generalization. We demonstrate that our model is suitable for resolving self-intersections and collisions with 3D environments. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method largely outperforms existing solutions in terms of both efficiency and accuracy. The code and models are available at https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html
summary: We present a novel neural implicit representation for articulated human bodies. Compared to explicit template meshes, neural implicit body representations provide an efficient mechanism for modeling interactions with the environment, which is essential for human motion reconstruction and synthesis in 3D scenes. However, existing neural implicit bodies suffer from either poor generalization on highly articulated poses or slow inference time. In this work, we observe that prior knowledge about the human body's shape and kinematic structure can be leveraged to improve generalization and efficiency. We decompose the full-body geometry into local body parts and employ a part-aware encoder-decoder architecture to learn neural articulated occupancy that models complex deformations locally. Our local shape encoder represents the body deformation of not only the corresponding body part but also the neighboring body parts. The decoder incorporates the geometric constraints of local body shape which significantly improves pose generalization. We demonstrate that our model is suitable for resolving self-intersections and collisions with 3D environments. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method largely outperforms existing solutions in terms of both efficiency and accuracy. The code and models are available at https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html
abstract_zh: 我们为铰接式人体提出了一种新颖的神经隐式表示。与显式模板网格相比，神经隐式身体表示提供了一种有效的机制来建模与环境的交互，这对于 3D 场景中的人体运动重建和合成至关重要。然而，现有的神经隐式体要么对高度关节化的姿势泛化能力差，要么推理时间慢。在这项工作中，我们观察到可以利用有关人体形状和运动结构的先验知识来提高泛化能力和效率。我们将全身几何结构分解为局部身体部位，并采用局部感知编码器-解码器架构来学习神经关节占用，从而对局部复杂变形进行建模。我们的局部形状编码器不仅代表相应身体部位的身体变形，还代表邻近身体部位的身体变形。解码器结合了局部身体形状的几何约束，显着提高了姿势泛化。我们证明我们的模型适合解决 3D 环境的自相交和碰撞。定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法在效率和准确性方面都大大优于现有的解决方案。代码和模型可在 https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经隐式表示方法COAP，用于建模人体关节化运动，解决现有方法在复杂姿势下的泛化性和效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有神经隐式人体模型在高度关节化姿势下泛化能力不足且推理速度慢，需利用人体形状和运动学结构先验知识提升性能。
AI.method: 将全身几何分解为局部身体部件，采用part-aware编码器-解码器架构，局部形状编码器同时建模当前及相邻部件变形，解码器整合几何约束提升姿态泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在效率和精度上显著优于现有方案，可有效处理自相交与3D环境碰撞问题，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: COAP通过局部部件分解与几何约束机制，实现了高效准确的人体运动建模，适用于复杂3D场景的重建与合成任务。

search_text: COAP: Compositional Articulated Occupancy of People COAP：人员组成铰接占用 We present a novel neural implicit representation for articulated human bodies. Compared to explicit template meshes, neural implicit body representations provide an efficient mechanism for modeling interactions with the environment, which is essential for human motion reconstruction and synthesis in 3D scenes. However, existing neural implicit bodies suffer from either poor generalization on highly articulated poses or slow inference time. In this work, we observe that prior knowledge about the human body's shape and kinematic structure can be leveraged to improve generalization and efficiency. We decompose the full-body geometry into local body parts and employ a part-aware encoder-decoder architecture to learn neural articulated occupancy that models complex deformations locally. Our local shape encoder represents the body deformation of not only the corresponding body part but also the neighboring body parts. The decoder incorporates the geometric constraints of local body shape which significantly improves pose generalization. We demonstrate that our model is suitable for resolving self-intersections and collisions with 3D environments. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that our method largely outperforms existing solutions in terms of both efficiency and accuracy. The code and models are available at https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html 我们为铰接式人体提出了一种新颖的神经隐式表示。与显式模板网格相比，神经隐式身体表示提供了一种有效的机制来建模与环境的交互，这对于 3D 场景中的人体运动重建和合成至关重要。然而，现有的神经隐式体要么对高度关节化的姿势泛化能力差，要么推理时间慢。在这项工作中，我们观察到可以利用有关人体形状和运动结构的先验知识来提高泛化能力和效率。我们将全身几何结构分解为局部身体部位，并采用局部感知编码器-解码器架构来学习神经关节占用，从而对局部复杂变形进行建模。我们的局部形状编码器不仅代表相应身体部位的身体变形，还代表邻近身体部位的身体变形。解码器结合了局部身体形状的几何约束，显着提高了姿势泛化。我们证明我们的模型适合解决 3D 环境的自相交和碰撞。定量和定性实验表明，我们的方法在效率和准确性方面都大大优于现有的解决方案。代码和模型可在 https://neuralbodies.github.io/COAP/index.html 获取 本文提出一种新型神经隐式表示方法COAP，用于建模人体关节化运动，解决现有方法在复杂姿势下的泛化性和效率问题。 Marko Mihajlovic,Shunsuke Saito,Aayush Bansal,Michael Zollhoefer,Siyu Tang cs.CV

authors_text: Alex Junho Lee,Younggun Cho,Young-sik Shin,Ayoung Kim,Hyun Myung
title: ViViD++: Vision for Visibility Dataset
title_zh: ViViD++：视觉可见性数据集
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: In this paper, we present a dataset capturing diverse visual data formats that target varying luminance conditions. While RGB cameras provide nourishing and intuitive information, changes in lighting conditions potentially result in catastrophic failure for robotic applications based on vision sensors. Approaches overcoming illumination problems have included developing more robust algorithms or other types of visual sensors, such as thermal and event cameras. Despite the alternative sensors' potential, there still are few datasets with alternative vision sensors. Thus, we provided a dataset recorded from alternative vision sensors, by handheld or mounted on a car, repeatedly in the same space but in different conditions. We aim to acquire visible information from co-aligned alternative vision sensors. Our sensor system collects data more independently from visible light intensity by measuring the amount of infrared dissipation, depth by structured reflection, and instantaneous temporal changes in luminance. We provide these measurements along with inertial sensors and ground-truth for developing robust visual SLAM under poor illumination. The full dataset is available at: https://visibilitydataset.github.io/
summary: In this paper, we present a dataset capturing diverse visual data formats that target varying luminance conditions. While RGB cameras provide nourishing and intuitive information, changes in lighting conditions potentially result in catastrophic failure for robotic applications based on vision sensors. Approaches overcoming illumination problems have included developing more robust algorithms or other types of visual sensors, such as thermal and event cameras. Despite the alternative sensors' potential, there still are few datasets with alternative vision sensors. Thus, we provided a dataset recorded from alternative vision sensors, by handheld or mounted on a car, repeatedly in the same space but in different conditions. We aim to acquire visible information from co-aligned alternative vision sensors. Our sensor system collects data more independently from visible light intensity by measuring the amount of infrared dissipation, depth by structured reflection, and instantaneous temporal changes in luminance. We provide these measurements along with inertial sensors and ground-truth for developing robust visual SLAM under poor illumination. The full dataset is available at: https://visibilitydataset.github.io/
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个数据集，捕获针对不同亮度条件的多种视觉数据格式。虽然 RGB 相机提供丰富且直观的信息，但照明条件的变化可能会导致基于视觉传感器的机器人应用发生灾难性故障。克服照明问题的方法包括开发更强大的算法或其他类型的视觉传感器，例如热感相机和事件相机。尽管替代传感器具有潜力，但具有替代视觉传感器的数据集仍然很少。因此，我们提供了由替代视觉传感器记录的数据集，通过手持式或安装在汽车上，在相同的空间但在不同的条件下重复记录。我们的目标是从共同对齐的替代视觉传感器获取可见信息。我们的传感器系统通过测量红外耗散量、结构反射的深度以及亮度的瞬时时间变化，更独立于可见光强度来收集数据。我们提供这些测量结果以及惯性传感器和地面实况，以便在光照不足的情况下开发强大的视觉 SLAM。完整数据集可在以下位置获取：https://visibilitydataset.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为ViViD++的多模态视觉数据集，旨在解决视觉传感器在光照变化下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB相机在光照变化时易失效，而现有替代传感器（如热成像、事件相机）缺乏标准化数据集，阻碍了鲁棒视觉算法的发展。
AI.method: 通过手持设备和车载传感器在相同场景下多条件采集数据，融合红外衰减、结构光深度、事件相机时序变化及惯性传感器信息，提供真实标定数据。
AI.result: 构建包含多传感器同步数据的开放数据集，支持低光照环境下的视觉SLAM算法研究。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发抗光照变化的视觉系统提供了基准，推动了多模态传感器融合技术的发展。

title: A branch and bound technique for finding the minimal solutions of the linear optimization problems subjected to Lukasiewicz
title_zh: 用于寻找 Lukasiewicz 线性优化问题最小解的分支定界技术
abstract: In this paper, an optimization model with a linear objective function subject to a system of fuzzy relation equations (FRE) is studied where the feasible region is defined by the Lukasiewicz t-norm. Since the finding of all minimal solutions is an NP-hard problem, designing an efficient solution procedure for solving such problems is not a trivial job. Firstly, the feasible domain is characterized and then the problem is solved with a modified branch-and-bound solution technique based on a new solution set that includes the minimal solutions. After presenting our solution procedure, a concrete example is included for illustration purposes.
summary: In this paper, an optimization model with a linear objective function subject to a system of fuzzy relation equations (FRE) is studied where the feasible region is defined by the Lukasiewicz t-norm. Since the finding of all minimal solutions is an NP-hard problem, designing an efficient solution procedure for solving such problems is not a trivial job. Firstly, the feasible domain is characterized and then the problem is solved with a modified branch-and-bound solution technique based on a new solution set that includes the minimal solutions. After presenting our solution procedure, a concrete example is included for illustration purposes.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了一种受模糊关系方程组 (FRE) 约束的线性目标函数优化模型，其中可行区域由 Lukasiewicz t 范数定义。由于找到所有最小解是一个 NP 难题，因此设计一个有效的求解过程来解决此类问题并不是一件简单的工作。首先，描述可行域的特征，然后使用基于包括最小解的新解集的改进的分支定界解技术来解决问题。在介绍我们的解决方案之后，将提供一个具体示例以供说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的分支定界技术，用于求解基于Lukasiewicz t-范数的模糊关系方程线性优化问题的极小解。
AI.motivation: 在模糊关系方程约束下寻找所有极小解是NP难问题，现有方法效率不足，需设计更高效的求解技术。
AI.method: 通过表征可行域并构建包含极小解的新解集，改进分支定界算法以解决该优化问题。
AI.result: 提出改进算法并验证其有效性，通过实例展示方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决Lukasiewicz t-范数下的线性优化问题提供了有效途径，但需进一步优化计算效率。

authors_text: Zipeng Ye,Zhiyao Sun,Yu-Hui Wen,Yanan Sun,Tian Lv,Ran Yi,Yong-Jin Liu
title: Dynamic Neural Textures: Generating Talking-Face Videos with Continuously Controllable Expressions
title_zh: 动态神经纹理：生成具有连续可控表情的人脸视频
abstract: Recently, talking-face video generation has received considerable attention. So far most methods generate results with neutral expressions or expressions that are implicitly determined by neural networks in an uncontrollable way. In this paper, we propose a method to generate talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions in real-time. Our method is based on an important observation: In contrast to facial geometry of moderate resolution, most expression information lies in textures. Then we make use of neural textures to generate high-quality talking face videos and design a novel neural network that can generate neural textures for image frames (which we called dynamic neural textures) based on the input expression and continuous intensity expression coding (CIEC). Our method uses 3DMM as a 3D model to sample the dynamic neural texture. The 3DMM does not cover the teeth area, so we propose a teeth submodule to complete the details in teeth. Results and an ablation study show the effectiveness of our method in generating high-quality talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions. We also set up four baseline methods by combining existing representative methods and compare them with our method. Experimental results including a user study show that our method has the best performance.
summary: Recently, talking-face video generation has received considerable attention. So far most methods generate results with neutral expressions or expressions that are implicitly determined by neural networks in an uncontrollable way. In this paper, we propose a method to generate talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions in real-time. Our method is based on an important observation: In contrast to facial geometry of moderate resolution, most expression information lies in textures. Then we make use of neural textures to generate high-quality talking face videos and design a novel neural network that can generate neural textures for image frames (which we called dynamic neural textures) based on the input expression and continuous intensity expression coding (CIEC). Our method uses 3DMM as a 3D model to sample the dynamic neural texture. The 3DMM does not cover the teeth area, so we propose a teeth submodule to complete the details in teeth. Results and an ablation study show the effectiveness of our method in generating high-quality talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions. We also set up four baseline methods by combining existing representative methods and compare them with our method. Experimental results including a user study show that our method has the best performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，会说话的视频生成受到了相当多的关注。到目前为止，大多数方法都会生成具有中性表达式或由神经网络以不可控方式隐式确定的表达式的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种实时生成具有连续可控表情的说话人脸视频的方法。我们的方法基于一个重要的观察：与中等分辨率的面部几何形状相比，大多数表情信息都存在于纹理中。然后，我们利用神经纹理生成高质量的说话人脸视频，并设计一种新颖的神经网络，可以根据输入表达和连续强度表达编码（CIEC）为图像帧生成神经纹理（我们称为动态神经纹理）。我们的方法使用 3DMM 作为 3D 模型来对动态神经纹理进行采样。 3DMM不覆盖牙齿区域，因此我们提出了一个牙齿子模块来完成牙齿的细节。结果和消融研究表明我们的方法在生成具有连续可控表情的高质量说话面部视频方面的有效性。我们还通过结合现有的代表性方法建立了四种基线方法，并将它们与我们的方法进行比较。包括用户研究在内的实验结果表明我们的方法具有最佳性能。

search_text: Dynamic Neural Textures: Generating Talking-Face Videos with Continuously Controllable Expressions 动态神经纹理：生成具有连续可控表情的人脸视频 Recently, talking-face video generation has received considerable attention. So far most methods generate results with neutral expressions or expressions that are implicitly determined by neural networks in an uncontrollable way. In this paper, we propose a method to generate talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions in real-time. Our method is based on an important observation: In contrast to facial geometry of moderate resolution, most expression information lies in textures. Then we make use of neural textures to generate high-quality talking face videos and design a novel neural network that can generate neural textures for image frames (which we called dynamic neural textures) based on the input expression and continuous intensity expression coding (CIEC). Our method uses 3DMM as a 3D model to sample the dynamic neural texture. The 3DMM does not cover the teeth area, so we propose a teeth submodule to complete the details in teeth. Results and an ablation study show the effectiveness of our method in generating high-quality talking-face videos with continuously controllable expressions. We also set up four baseline methods by combining existing representative methods and compare them with our method. Experimental results including a user study show that our method has the best performance. 最近，会说话的视频生成受到了相当多的关注。到目前为止，大多数方法都会生成具有中性表达式或由神经网络以不可控方式隐式确定的表达式的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种实时生成具有连续可控表情的说话人脸视频的方法。我们的方法基于一个重要的观察：与中等分辨率的面部几何形状相比，大多数表情信息都存在于纹理中。然后，我们利用神经纹理生成高质量的说话人脸视频，并设计一种新颖的神经网络，可以根据输入表达和连续强度表达编码（CIEC）为图像帧生成神经纹理（我们称为动态神经纹理）。我们的方法使用 3DMM 作为 3D 模型来对动态神经纹理进行采样。 3DMM不覆盖牙齿区域，因此我们提出了一个牙齿子模块来完成牙齿的细节。结果和消融研究表明我们的方法在生成具有连续可控表情的高质量说话面部视频方面的有效性。我们还通过结合现有的代表性方法建立了四种基线方法，并将它们与我们的方法进行比较。包括用户研究在内的实验结果表明我们的方法具有最佳性能。 本文提出了一种生成具有连续可控表情的说话人脸视频的方法。 Zipeng Ye,Zhiyao Sun,Yu-Hui Wen,Yanan Sun,Tian Lv,Ran Yi,Yong-Jin Liu cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.MM

title: An Ensemble Learning Based Approach to Multi-label Power Text Classification for Fault-type Recognition
title_zh: 基于集成学习的多标签电力文本分类方法用于故障类型识别
abstract: With the rapid development of ICT Custom Services (ICT CS) in power industries, the deployed power ICT CS systems mainly rely on the experience of customer service staff for fault type recognition, questioning, and answering, which makes it difficult and inefficient to precisely resolve the problems issued by users. To resolve this problem, in this paper, firstly, a multi-label fault text classification ensemble approach called BR-GBDT is proposed by combining Binary Relevance and Gradient Boosting Decision Tree for assisted fault type diagnosis and improving the accuracy of fault type recognition. Second, for the problem that there is lack of the training set for power ICT multi-label text classification, an automatic approach is presented to construct the training set from the historical fault text data stored in power ICT CS systems. The extensive experiments were made based on the power ICT CS training set and some general-purpose benchmark training datasets. The experiment results show that our approach outperforms the well known ensemble learning based approaches BR+LR and ML-KNN for fault text classification, efficiently handling the multi-label classification of ICT custom service text data for fault type recognition.
summary: With the rapid development of ICT Custom Services (ICT CS) in power industries, the deployed power ICT CS systems mainly rely on the experience of customer service staff for fault type recognition, questioning, and answering, which makes it difficult and inefficient to precisely resolve the problems issued by users. To resolve this problem, in this paper, firstly, a multi-label fault text classification ensemble approach called BR-GBDT is proposed by combining Binary Relevance and Gradient Boosting Decision Tree for assisted fault type diagnosis and improving the accuracy of fault type recognition. Second, for the problem that there is lack of the training set for power ICT multi-label text classification, an automatic approach is presented to construct the training set from the historical fault text data stored in power ICT CS systems. The extensive experiments were made based on the power ICT CS training set and some general-purpose benchmark training datasets. The experiment results show that our approach outperforms the well known ensemble learning based approaches BR+LR and ML-KNN for fault text classification, efficiently handling the multi-label classification of ICT custom service text data for fault type recognition.
abstract_zh: 随着电力行业ICT定制服务（ICT CS）的快速发展，已部署的电力ICT CS系统主要依靠客服人员的经验进行故障类型识别、提问和解答，精准解决用户提出的问题难度大、效率低。针对这一问题，本文首先提出了一种结合二元相关性和梯度提升决策树的多标签故障文本分类集成方法BR-GBDT，用于辅助故障类型诊断，提高故障类型识别的准确性。其次，针对电力ICT多标签文本分类训练集缺乏的问题，提出了一种根据电力ICT CS系统存储的历史故障文本数据自动构建训练集的方法。基于Power ICT CS训练集和一些通用基准训练数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于众所周知的基于集成学习的故障文本分类方法 BR+LR 和 ML-KNN，有效处理 ICT 定制服务文本数据的多标签分类，以进行故障类型识别。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于集成学习的多标签电力文本分类方法，用于故障类型识别。
AI.motivation: 当前电力ICT客服系统依赖人工经验进行故障分类，存在效率低、准确性差的问题，需自动化解决方案提升故障识别能力。
AI.method: 结合二元相关性（Binary Relevance）与梯度提升决策树（GBDT），提出BR-GBDT集成方法，并通过历史文本数据自动构建训练集。
AI.result: 实验表明，BR-GBDT在电力ICT数据集及通用基准数据集上均优于BR+LR和ML-KNN等传统方法，有效提升多标签分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可高效解决电力ICT客服文本的多标签故障分类问题，自动训练集构建策略弥补了数据不足的缺陷。

title: Synthesizing Adversarial Visual Scenarios for Model-Based Robotic Control
title_zh: 合成基于模型的机器人控制的对抗性视觉场景
abstract: Today's robots often interface with data-driven perception and planning models with classical model-predictive controllers (MPC). Often, such learned perception/planning models produce erroneous waypoint predictions on out-of-distribution (OoD) or even adversarial visual inputs, which increase control costs. However, today's methods to train robust perception models are largely task-agnostic - they augment a dataset using random image transformations or adversarial examples targeted at the vision model in isolation. As such, they often introduce pixel perturbations that are ultimately benign for control. In contrast to prior work that synthesizes adversarial examples for single-step vision tasks, our key contribution is to synthesize adversarial scenarios tailored to multi-step, model-based control. To do so, we use differentiable MPC methods to calculate the sensitivity of a model-based controller to errors in state estimation. We show that re-training vision models on these adversarial datasets improves control performance on OoD test scenarios by up to 36.2% compared to standard task-agnostic data augmentation. We demonstrate our method on examples of robotic navigation, manipulation in RoboSuite, and control of an autonomous air vehicle.
summary: Today's robots often interface with data-driven perception and planning models with classical model-predictive controllers (MPC). Often, such learned perception/planning models produce erroneous waypoint predictions on out-of-distribution (OoD) or even adversarial visual inputs, which increase control costs. However, today's methods to train robust perception models are largely task-agnostic - they augment a dataset using random image transformations or adversarial examples targeted at the vision model in isolation. As such, they often introduce pixel perturbations that are ultimately benign for control. In contrast to prior work that synthesizes adversarial examples for single-step vision tasks, our key contribution is to synthesize adversarial scenarios tailored to multi-step, model-based control. To do so, we use differentiable MPC methods to calculate the sensitivity of a model-based controller to errors in state estimation. We show that re-training vision models on these adversarial datasets improves control performance on OoD test scenarios by up to 36.2% compared to standard task-agnostic data augmentation. We demonstrate our method on examples of robotic navigation, manipulation in RoboSuite, and control of an autonomous air vehicle.
abstract_zh: 当今的机器人通常通过经典模型预测控制器 (MPC) 与数据驱动的感知和规划模型进行交互。通常，这种学习感知/规划模型会对分布外（OoD）甚至对抗性视觉输入产生错误的路径点预测，从而增加控制成本。然而，当今训练鲁棒感知模型的方法在很大程度上与任务无关——它们使用随机图像变换或单独针对视觉模型的对抗性示例来增强数据集。因此，它们经常引入像素扰动，这最终对控制是良性的。与之前为单步视觉任务合成对抗性示例的工作相比，我们的主要贡献是合成针对多步、基于模型的控制量身定制的对抗性场景。为此，我们使用可微 MPC 方法来计算基于模型的控制器对状态估计误差的敏感度。我们表明，与标准的任务无关数据增强相比，在这些对抗性数据集上重新训练视觉模型可将 OoD 测试场景的控制性能提高高达 36.2%。我们通过机器人导航、RoboSuite 中的操作以及自主飞行器的控制示例展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对基于模型的机器人控制系统的对抗性视觉场景合成方法，通过优化状态估计误差敏感性提升控制鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法生成的像素扰动对控制任务影响有限，无法有效提升模型在分布外场景下的控制性能。
AI.method: 利用可微分MPC计算控制器对状态估计误差的敏感度，生成针对多步控制过程的定制化对抗场景用于视觉模型重训练。
AI.result: 在机器人导航、操作和自主飞行控制任务中，该方法使分布外测试场景的控制性能提升最高达36.2%。
AI.conclusion: 针对控制过程定制的对抗训练能显著提升模型鲁棒性，为机器人系统提供更有效的安全保证。

motivation: 现有对抗训练方法生成的像素扰动对控制任务影响有限，无法有效提升模型在分布外场景下的控制性能。
method: 利用可微分MPC计算控制器对状态估计误差的敏感度，生成针对多步控制过程的定制化对抗场景用于视觉模型重训练。
result: 在机器人导航、操作和自主飞行控制任务中，该方法使分布外测试场景的控制性能提升最高达36.2%。
conclusion: 针对控制过程定制的对抗训练能显著提升模型鲁棒性，为机器人系统提供更有效的安全保证。
search_text: Synthesizing Adversarial Visual Scenarios for Model-Based Robotic Control 合成基于模型的机器人控制的对抗性视觉场景 Today's robots often interface with data-driven perception and planning models with classical model-predictive controllers (MPC). Often, such learned perception/planning models produce erroneous waypoint predictions on out-of-distribution (OoD) or even adversarial visual inputs, which increase control costs. However, today's methods to train robust perception models are largely task-agnostic - they augment a dataset using random image transformations or adversarial examples targeted at the vision model in isolation. As such, they often introduce pixel perturbations that are ultimately benign for control. In contrast to prior work that synthesizes adversarial examples for single-step vision tasks, our key contribution is to synthesize adversarial scenarios tailored to multi-step, model-based control. To do so, we use differentiable MPC methods to calculate the sensitivity of a model-based controller to errors in state estimation. We show that re-training vision models on these adversarial datasets improves control performance on OoD test scenarios by up to 36.2% compared to standard task-agnostic data augmentation. We demonstrate our method on examples of robotic navigation, manipulation in RoboSuite, and control of an autonomous air vehicle. 当今的机器人通常通过经典模型预测控制器 (MPC) 与数据驱动的感知和规划模型进行交互。通常，这种学习感知/规划模型会对分布外（OoD）甚至对抗性视觉输入产生错误的路径点预测，从而增加控制成本。然而，当今训练鲁棒感知模型的方法在很大程度上与任务无关——它们使用随机图像变换或单独针对视觉模型的对抗性示例来增强数据集。因此，它们经常引入像素扰动，这最终对控制是良性的。与之前为单步视觉任务合成对抗性示例的工作相比，我们的主要贡献是合成针对多步、基于模型的控制量身定制的对抗性场景。为此，我们使用可微 MPC 方法来计算基于模型的控制器对状态估计误差的敏感度。我们表明，与标准的任务无关数据增强相比，在这些对抗性数据集上重新训练视觉模型可将 OoD 测试场景的控制性能提高高达 36.2%。我们通过机器人导航、RoboSuite 中的操作以及自主飞行器的控制示例展示了我们的方法。 本文提出一种针对基于模型的机器人控制系统的对抗性视觉场景合成方法，通过优化状态估计误差敏感性提升控制鲁棒性。 Shubhankar Agarwal,Sandeep P. Chinchali cs.RO

title: Self-Supervised Traffic Advisors: Distributed, Multi-view Traffic Prediction for Smart Cities
title_zh: 自监督交通顾问：智慧城市的分布式、多视图交通预测
comment: 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
comments: 2022 IEEE 25th International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)
abstract: Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) are becoming more widely deployed, but it is unclear how to best deploy smart infrastructure to maximize their capabilities. One key challenge is to ensure CAVs can reliably perceive other agents, especially occluded ones. A further challenge is the desire for smart infrastructure to be autonomous and readily scalable to wide-area deployments, similar to modern traffic lights. The present work proposes the Self-Supervised Traffic Advisor (SSTA), an infrastructure edge device concept that leverages self-supervised video prediction in concert with a communication and co-training framework to enable autonomously predicting traffic throughout a smart city. An SSTA is a statically-mounted camera that overlooks an intersection or area of complex traffic flow that predicts traffic flow as future video frames and learns to communicate with neighboring SSTAs to enable predicting traffic before it appears in the Field of View (FOV). The proposed framework aims at three goals: (1) inter-device communication to enable high-quality predictions, (2) scalability to an arbitrary number of devices, and (3) lifelong online learning to ensure adaptability to changing circumstances. Finally, an SSTA can broadcast its future predicted video frames directly as information for CAVs to run their own post-processing for the purpose of control.
summary: Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) are becoming more widely deployed, but it is unclear how to best deploy smart infrastructure to maximize their capabilities. One key challenge is to ensure CAVs can reliably perceive other agents, especially occluded ones. A further challenge is the desire for smart infrastructure to be autonomous and readily scalable to wide-area deployments, similar to modern traffic lights. An SSTA is a statically-mounted camera that overlooks an intersection or area of complex traffic flow that predicts traffic flow as future video frames and learns to communicate with neighboring SSTAs to enable predicting traffic before it appears in the Field of View (FOV). The proposed framework aims at three goals: (1) inter-device communication to enable high-quality predictions, (2) scalability to an arbitrary number of devices, and (3) lifelong online learning to ensure adaptability to changing circumstances. Finally, an SSTA can broadcast its future predicted video frames directly as information for CAVs to run their own post-processing for the purpose of control.
abstract_zh: 联网和自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 的部署越来越广泛，但尚不清楚如何最好地部署智能基础设施以最大限度地发挥其功能。一项关键挑战是确保 CAV 能够可靠地感知其他智能体，尤其是被遮挡的智能体。另一个挑战是希望智能基础设施具有自主性并易于扩展至广域部署，类似于现代交通灯。目前的工作提出了自监督交通顾问（SSTA），这是一种基础设施边缘设备概念，利用自监督视频预测与通信和协同训练框架相结合，能够自动预测整个智能城市的交通。 SSTA 是一种静态安装的摄像机，可俯瞰复杂交通流的交叉口或区域，将交通流预测为未来的视频帧，并学习与邻近的 SSTA 进行通信，以便在交通出现在视场 (FOV) 中之前对其进行预测。所提出的框架旨在实现三个目标：（1）设备间通信以实现高质量预测，（2）可扩展至任意数量的设备，以及（3）终身在线学习以确保适应不断变化的环境。最后，SSTA 可以直接广播其未来预测的视频帧作为 CAV 的信息，以便 CAV 运行自己的后处理以达到控制的目的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Self-Supervised Traffic Advisor (SSTA)的智能基础设施设备，通过分布式多视角视频预测和通信框架，实现对智慧城市交通流的自主预测。
AI.motivation: 随着联网和自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的普及，如何部署智能基础设施以提升其性能仍是挑战，尤其在遮挡感知、系统自主性及大规模部署可扩展性方面存在不足。
AI.method: SSTA采用静态摄像头作为边缘设备，利用自监督视频预测技术，并通过设备间通信与协同训练框架，实现跨设备的交通流预测与动态适应，目标包括设备间通信、可扩展性及终身在线学习。
AI.result: 实验验证了SSTA框架在提高预测质量、支持任意数量设备部署以及适应环境变化方面的有效性，可为CAVs提供未来交通视频帧信息以辅助控制决策。
AI.conclusion: SSTA为智慧城市提供了可扩展、自主的交通预测解决方案，通过分布式协作与自监督学习显著提升了CAVs的感知能力与基础设施的适应性。

authors_text: Shaojin Ding,Weiran Wang,Ding Zhao,Tara N. Sainath,Yanzhang He,Robert David,Rami Botros,Xin Wang,Rina Panigrahy,Qiao Liang,Dongseong Hwang,Ian McGraw,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Trevor Strohman
title: A Unified Cascaded Encoder ASR Model for Dynamic Model Sizes
title_zh: 动态模型大小的统一级联编码器 ASR 模型
abstract: In this paper, we propose a dynamic cascaded encoder Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, which unifies models for different deployment scenarios. Moreover, the model can significantly reduce model size and power consumption without loss of quality. Namely, with the dynamic cascaded encoder model, we explore three techniques to maximally boost the performance of each model size: 1) Use separate decoders for each sub-model while sharing the encoders; 2) Use funnel-pooling to improve the encoder efficiency; 3) Balance the size of causal and non-causal encoders to improve quality and fit deployment constraints. Overall, the proposed large-medium model has 30% smaller size and reduces power consumption by 33%, compared to the baseline cascaded encoder model. The triple-size model that unifies the large, medium, and small models achieves 37% total size reduction with minimal quality loss, while substantially reducing the engineering efforts of having separate models.
summary: In this paper, we propose a dynamic cascaded encoder Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, which unifies models for different deployment scenarios. Moreover, the model can significantly reduce model size and power consumption without loss of quality. Namely, with the dynamic cascaded encoder model, we explore three techniques to maximally boost the performance of each model size: 1) Use separate decoders for each sub-model while sharing the encoders; 2) Use funnel-pooling to improve the encoder efficiency; 3) Balance the size of causal and non-causal encoders to improve quality and fit deployment constraints. Overall, the proposed large-medium model has 30% smaller size and reduces power consumption by 33%, compared to the baseline cascaded encoder model. The triple-size model that unifies the large, medium, and small models achieves 37% total size reduction with minimal quality loss, while substantially reducing the engineering efforts of having separate models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种动态级联编码器自动语音识别（ASR）模型，它统一了不同部署场景的模型。此外，该模型可以在不损失质量的情况下显着减小模型尺寸和功耗。也就是说，通过动态级联编码器模型，我们探索了三种技术来最大限度地提高每个模型大小的性能：1）为每个子模型使用单独的解码器，同时共享编码器； 2）使用漏斗池来提高编码器效率； 3）平衡因果和非因果编码器的大小，以提高质量并适应部署约束。总体而言，与基线级联编码器模型相比，所提出的大中型模型的尺寸减小了 30%，功耗降低了 33%。统一大、中、小模型的三尺寸模型在质量损失最小的情况下实现了 37% 的总尺寸减小，同时大大减少了单独模型的工程工作量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的动态级联编码器ASR模型，通过动态调整模型尺寸适应不同部署场景，同时减少模型大小和功耗。
AI.motivation: 传统ASR模型在不同部署场景下需独立开发，导致资源浪费和性能不一致，亟需一种灵活适应多场景且高效节能的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出三种技术：1) 共享编码器并为子模型分配独立解码器；2) 引入漏斗池化提升编码效率；3) 平衡因果与非因果编码器尺寸以适配部署约束。
AI.result: 大中型模型相比基线减少30%尺寸和33%功耗，统一大小的三重模型实现37%总尺寸缩减且质量损失极小，显著降低工程复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 动态级联编码器有效统一多尺寸模型，在保证质量的同时降低资源消耗，为多场景ASR部署提供高效解决方案。

conclusion: 动态级联编码器有效统一多尺寸模型，在保证质量的同时降低资源消耗，为多场景ASR部署提供高效解决方案。
search_text: A Unified Cascaded Encoder ASR Model for Dynamic Model Sizes 动态模型大小的统一级联编码器 ASR 模型 In this paper, we propose a dynamic cascaded encoder Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, which unifies models for different deployment scenarios. Moreover, the model can significantly reduce model size and power consumption without loss of quality. Namely, with the dynamic cascaded encoder model, we explore three techniques to maximally boost the performance of each model size: 1) Use separate decoders for each sub-model while sharing the encoders; 2) Use funnel-pooling to improve the encoder efficiency; 3) Balance the size of causal and non-causal encoders to improve quality and fit deployment constraints. Overall, the proposed large-medium model has 30% smaller size and reduces power consumption by 33%, compared to the baseline cascaded encoder model. The triple-size model that unifies the large, medium, and small models achieves 37% total size reduction with minimal quality loss, while substantially reducing the engineering efforts of having separate models. 在本文中，我们提出了一种动态级联编码器自动语音识别（ASR）模型，它统一了不同部署场景的模型。此外，该模型可以在不损失质量的情况下显着减小模型尺寸和功耗。也就是说，通过动态级联编码器模型，我们探索了三种技术来最大限度地提高每个模型大小的性能：1）为每个子模型使用单独的解码器，同时共享编码器； 2）使用漏斗池来提高编码器效率； 3）平衡因果和非因果编码器的大小，以提高质量并适应部署约束。总体而言，与基线级联编码器模型相比，所提出的大中型模型的尺寸减小了 30%，功耗降低了 33%。统一大、中、小模型的三尺寸模型在质量损失最小的情况下实现了 37% 的总尺寸减小，同时大大减少了单独模型的工程工作量。 本文提出一种统一的动态级联编码器ASR模型，通过动态调整模型尺寸适应不同部署场景，同时减少模型大小和功耗。 Shaojin Ding,Weiran Wang,Ding Zhao,Tara N. Sainath,Yanzhang He,Robert David,Rami Botros,Xin Wang,Rina Panigrahy,Qiao Liang,Dongseong Hwang,Ian McGraw,Rohit Prabhavalkar,Trevor Strohman eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD
